name: Tom Fitton
subject: Federal Court Battle over January 6 Videos
body:
Lawsuit Challenge to Left Racism Advances

[INSIDE JW]

U.S. Capitol Police Tells Federal Court January 6 Videos Are Not
Public Records

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25643&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9NNm1JZ2FFbmRhUT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==]

What is Nancy Pelosi hiding?

The U.S. Capitol Police are trying to shut down a public records
lawsuit for January 6 disturbance video and emails by arguing
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25642&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtdS1zLWNhcGl0b2wtcG9saWNlLW1vdGlvbi0wMDQwMS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=]
to a federal court that the requested records are “not public
records.”

We filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=22137&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctc3Vlcy1jYXBpdG9sLXBvbGljZS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=]
in February under the common law right of access to public records
after the U.S. Capitol Police refused to provide any records in
response to a January 21, 2021, request for:

* Email communications between the U.S. Capitol Police Executive
Team and the Capitol Police Board concerning the security of the
Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from
January 1, 2021 through January 10, 2021.
* Email communications of the Capitol Police Board with the Federal
Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Justice, and the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security concerning the security of the Capitol
on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1,
2021through January 10, 2021.
* All video footage from within the Capitol between 12 pm and 9 pm
on January 6, 2021.

Regarding withholding the videos, the U.S. Capitol Police told the
court:

The USCP’s camera security system, including footage recorded by it
within the Capitol and sought by [Judicial Watch], is solely for
national security and law enforcement purposes.
Access to video footage from the USCP’s camera security system is
limited to narrow circumstances and strictly controlled by USCP
policy.
The USCP has not made any public disclosures of video footage from
January 6 from its camera security system.
There are currently pending criminal investigations and prosecutions
of individuals involved in the events at the U.S. Capitol on January
6, 2021.
There are currently pending congressional investigations into the
events at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021.
In its motion, the Capitol Police also argue the case should be closed
because, among other assertions, even if the records Judicial Watch
asks for are “public records,” the USCP’s interests in
confidentiality “outweigh any public interest in those materials.”

It also conveniently claims not to have access to many of the emails
we seek.

To cut to the chase, the U.S. Capitol Police are hiding a reported
14,000 hours of January 6 video from the American people in order to
help Nancy Pelosi’s abusive targeting of Trump’s supporters and
other political opponents. Any other police department in America
would be investigated and defunded for such abusive secrecy. The
Pelosi Congress is in cover-up mode regarding January 6.

As you know, we are conducting an extensive investigation into the
January 6 events in Washington, DC.

Earlier this month, we uncovered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25551&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFiYml0dC1jcmVtYXRpb24tcmVxdWVzdC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=]
documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner
(OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli
Babbitt. These documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for
permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of
her body and that due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s
case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a
secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s
records. Additionally, Babbitt’s fingerprints were emailed to a
person supposedly working for the DC government, which resulted in
Microsoft “undeliverable” messages written in Chinese characters
being returned.

In July, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25315&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYmFuay1kYXRhLWphbi02Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==]
against
the DOJ for records of communication between the FBI and several
financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial
transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5
and January 6, 2021. The FBI refused to confirm or deny any such
records exist. Also in July, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25331&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcG9zdGFsLXNlcnZpY2Utc29jaWFsLW1lZGlhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==]
against
the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information relating to the
tracking and collecting of Americans’ social media posts through its
Internet Covert Operations Program (iCOP).

In May, we sued
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=24982&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctamFuLTYtcGVudGFnb24tdXNwcC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=]
both
the Department of the Interior and the Department of Defense for
records regarding the deployment of armed forces around the Capitol
complex in Washington, D.C., in January and February of 2021.

In March, we sued the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol
Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records. Pressure from this
lawsuit helped lead to the disclosure that Capitol Police Officer
Brian Sicknick died of natural causes
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=24927&F=T&].
Also in March, we filed a FOIA lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=22334&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvcGVsb3NpLXBlbnRhZ29uLWNoaWVmLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==]
against
the U.S. Department of Defense for records about House Speaker Nancy
Pelosi’s January 8, 2021, telephone call with Chairman of the Joint
Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley.

Once again, Judicial Watch is doing the heavy lifting that a Congress,
a media, and an honest executive branch also ought to be doing!

JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS BIDEN PENTAGON EMAILS ON ‘COUNTERING EXTREMISM
WORKING GROUP’

Our military is now in an ideological war with itself. It is
undergoing an ideological purge, endorsed by President Biden’s
appointed Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin. We wanted to know more
CRT-themed agenda targeting our troops, so we filed a Freedom of
Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Defense
seeking records of communications from Austin, Chairman of the Joint
Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley, and Vice Chairman of the Joint
Chiefs of Staff John Hyten regarding the Pentagon’s Countering
Extremism Working Group (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense
_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25644&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLWV4dHJlbWlzbS1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDIxNDUvXShObz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==.
1:21-cv-02145)).

We sued here in DC after the Pentagon failed to reply to our May 7,
2021, FOIA request, in which we asked for the following public
records:

All emails exchanged between Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and
email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil referencing “Countering
Extremism Working Group” and/or “CEWG.”

All emails exchanged between Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff
Gen. Mark Milley and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil
referencing “Countering Extremism Working Group” and/or
“CEWG.”

All emails exchanged between Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of
Staff Gen. John Hyten and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil
referencing “Countering Extremism Working Group” and/or “CEWG."
During his Senate confirmation
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25622&F=T&]
hearing in January, which followed the January 6 disturbance at the
U.S. Capitol building, Austin vowed that he would purge the U.S.
military of “racists and extremists.” Austin told the Senate Armed
Services Committee, “The job of the Department of Defense is to keep
America safe from our enemies. But we can’t do that if some of those
enemies lie within our own ranks.”

On February 3, Austin ordered
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25623&F=T&]
a 60-day military stand down to address the “challenge of extremism
in the ranks.”

Austin established
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25606&F=T&]
the Countering Extremism Working Group (CEWG) on April 9.

Austin selected Bishop Garrison, Senior Advisor to the Secretary of
Defense on Human Capital and Diversity, Equity and Inclusion, to head
up the CEWG. The effort has been criticized
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25624&F=T&]
as a racialized vehicle to attack supporters of President Trump and
others who espouse conservative views.

In July 2019, Garrison tweeted
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25625&F=T&]
of then-President Donald Trump:

Silence from our Congressional leaders is complicity. He is only going
to get worse from here, & his party and its leadership are watching it
happen while doing nothing to stop it. Support for him, a racist, is
support for ALL his beliefs.

He's dragging a lot of bad actors (misogynists, extremists, other
racists) out into the light, normalizing their actions. If you support
the President, you support that. There is no room for nuance with
this. There is no more “but I'm not like that” talk.
This week’s Afghanistan humiliation is further evidence that the
Biden Pentagon’s obsession with targeting conservatives in the
military undermines our national security. Why is the Pentagon’s
leadership hiding records about its ongoing political purge and attack
on the First Amendment rights of our troops?

TEXAS SUPREME COURT ASKED TO REVIEW SUIT FOR DOCS ON QATARI FUNDING OF
TEXAS A&M

We have long investigated
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25645&F=T&]
the role of unfriendly foreign governments in American universities,
and it hasn’t abated. One might suppose that there is just too much
money involved. The latest example is the nation of Qatar.

We filed a petition for review
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25633&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3phY2hvci12LXFhdGFyLWFwcGVhbC0wMDEyOS0wNTQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMTAwNDcxNg==]
with the Supreme Court of Texas regarding a lawsuit on behalf of our
client Zachor Legal Institute under the Texas Public Information Act
(TPIA), seeking records about potential influence by the Qatar
government’s funding of certain Texas A&M University programs at its
campus in Education City, Al Rayyan, Qatar (_Zachor Legal Institute,
v. Qatar Foundation For Education, Science And Community Development _
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25646&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL3phY2hvci12LXFhdGFyLWFwcGVhbC0wMDEyOS0wNTQyL10oTm8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=.
21-0542))

Zachor Legal Institute is a U.S.-based advocacy group dedicated to
combatting the spread of anti-Semitism. Zachor made two requests under
the Texas Public Information Act for information about the funding or
donations made to Texas A&M by the government of Qatar and agencies
and subdivisions of the government of Qatar. Qatar controversially has
aligned itself with Islamic terrorists and extremists
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=13752&F=T&],
which has placed it at odds with the United States, Israel and other
U.S. allies in the Middle East.

Zachor began asking two years ago for information about Qatari funding
of Texas A&M research and how Texas A&M, a public university, was able
to establish a degree-conferring campus in Qatar without the Texas
Legislature’s permission or involvement. In 2003 Texas A&M
established a campus in Qatar that now grants Bachelor of Science
degrees
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=13753&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWF0YXIudGFtdS5lZHUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODIxMDA0NzE2]
in Chemical Engineering,
Electrical and Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and
Petroleum Engineering. Since 2011, advanced degrees have been offered
in Chemical Engineering.

Texas A&M at Qatar has awarded more than 1000 degrees
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=13754&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWF0YXIudGFtdS5lZHUvYWJvdXQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODIxMDA0NzE2]
since 2007.

In October 2018, Qatar filed suit against the Texas attorney general
to prevent the disclosure of its funding information. On April 29,
2019, we filed a petition
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=15917&F=T&]
to intervene on behalf of Zachor.

We contend that a key issue, in this case, is the proper
interpretation of the TPIA [Texas Public Information Act], an
important statute governing the public’s right to access public
information. We are asking the court to interpret whether the act
waives the Attorney General’s immunity from being sued – not by a
governmental body seeking to withhold information but by a private
entity (Qatar Foundation) wishing to have public information kept
secret – or “whether the governmental body that holds the
information and has the duty to release it" must be the party filing
the lawsuit.

The Texas Attorney General ruled that Texas A&M could withhold only
the donors’ identifying information but must release the other
requested information. The Qatar Foundation filed a suit challenging
the Attorney General’s opinion. The Honorable Karin Crump, presiding
Judge of the 200th Judicial District Court of Travis County, dismissed
the Qatar Foundation’s claims on jurisdictional grounds leaving the
Attorney General’s opinion intact. The Qatar Foundation appealed to
the Texas Court of Appeals, Third District, at Austin, Texas. The
court reversed the district court’s jurisdictional order and
remanded the case to the district court for further proceedings.
Zachor is now asking the Texas Supreme Court to grant its petition for
review and render judgment that Qatar Foundation’s lawsuit to keep
this public information secret is jurisdictionally barred.

As we point out in our petition, the U.S. Congressional Research
Service has found serious issues worthy of investigation with
Qatar’s involvement in discrimination and terrorism:

The Qatari government has been identified as a vocal purveyor of
anti-Semitism and promoter of extremist terrorist groups. The merits
of this case ask whether the Qatar Foundation (a private entity) will
be allowed to use the (Texas Public Information Act) to preclude
public scrutiny of its involvement with and influence on a public
university.
Marc Greendorfer, president of Zachor Legal Institute, said, “When
Zachor first submitted the public records request, we were concerned
that foreign governments were using United States’ university
campuses as breeding grounds for hate and indoctrination. With the
dramatic and rapid explosion of antisemitism and anti-American unrest
that have spread on campuses since we submitted the request, our
concerns are only amplified. We urge the Texas Supreme Court to allow
Zachor, and the people of the State of Texas, to see what Qatar is
trying to hide.”

The Qatari government has been misusing our nation’s courts to hide
the details of its controversial funding of Texas A & M University. We
hope the Texas Supreme Court puts a stop to this.

DEPOSITION ORDERED FOR MAYOR LIGHTFOOT’S OFFICE OVER HER RACIST
INTERVIEW POLICY

There’s been an important development in our legal battle against
Chicago’s mayor.

A federal court ordered the deposition of a representative of Chicago
Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s office in our lawsuit over
her discriminatory interview policy. In doing so, the court rejected
arguments by the mayor’s lawyers against discovery and to dismiss
the legal challenge.

We filed a motion for limited jurisdictional discovery
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25641&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1kaXNjb3ZlcnktMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODIxMDA0NzE2]
after Mayor Lightfoot’s office once again changed its explanation
about when and how she would only grant interviews to “journalists
of color.” Only after we filed our lawsuit and the mayor had to
defend her actions in court did the public learn that the racially
biased criteria only applied to a purported “press tour.”

On May 27, 2021, we filed a civil rights lawsuit
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=25062&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbGlnaHRmb290X2NvbXBsYWludC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjEwMDQ3MTY=]
on
behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas
Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot for violating their
First Amendment Rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection
under the Fourteenth Amendment (_Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56473&L=24999&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2NhdGVuYWNjaS1ldC1hbC12LWxpZ2h0Zm9vdC1jb21wbGFpbnQtMDI4NTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwODIxMDA0NzE2]
(No. 1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in
Palatine, Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit.

Catenacci, a white male, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting
a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The office never replied to the
request or to multiple follow up emails from Catenacci.

The civil rights lawsuit argues that Lightfoot purposefully
discriminated against Catenacci “because of his race by stating that
she would only grant interview requests from ‘journalists of
color....’”

“America’s civil rights heroes must be turning over in their
graves because of the overt racism now openly embraced by so many on
the far left in America, including Chicago’s Mayor Lightfoot. We are
optimistic the courts will agree that government officials are still
not allowed to discriminate in America,” Daily Caller News
Foundation President Neil Patel said.

“I look forward to understanding how the mayor's office implemented
such a discriminatory policy. My rights, and the First Amendment
rights of countless other reporters in America, must not be trampled
upon,” Thomas Catenacci said.

We’re pleased by the federal court ruling requiring a representative
of Mayor Lightfoot to explain, under oath, the scope and nature of her
racist interview policy.

Until next week ...

clean_body: Lawsuit Challenge to Left Racism Advances [INSIDE JW] U.S. Capitol Police Tells Federal Court January 6 Videos Are Not Public Records [==] What is Nancy Pelosi hiding? The U.S. Capitol Police are trying to shut down a public records lawsuit for January 6 disturbance video and emails by arguing [=] to a federal court that the requested records are “not public records.” We filed a lawsuit [=] in February under the common law right of access to public records after the U.S. Capitol Police refused to provide any records in response to a January 21, 2021, request for: Email communications between the U.S. Capitol Police Executive Team and the Capitol Police Board concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021 through January 10, 2021. Email communications of the Capitol Police Board with the Federal Bureau of Investigation, the U.S. Department of Justice, and the U.S. Department of Homeland Security concerning the security of the Capitol on January 6, 2021. The timeframe of this request is from January 1, 2021through January 10, 2021. * All video footage from within the Capitol between 12 pm and 9 pm on January 6, 2021. Regarding withholding the videos, the U.S. Capitol Police told the court: The USCP’s camera security system, including footage recorded by it within the Capitol and sought by [Judicial Watch], is solely for national security and law enforcement purposes. Access to video footage from the USCP’s camera security system is limited to narrow circumstances and strictly controlled by USCP policy. The USCP has not made any public disclosures of video footage from January 6 from its camera security system. There are currently pending criminal investigations and prosecutions of individuals involved in the events at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. There are currently pending congressional investigations into the events at the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021. In its motion, the Capitol Police also argue the case should be closed because, among other assertions, even if the records Judicial Watch asks for are “public records,” the USCP’s interests in confidentiality “outweigh any public interest in those materials.” It also conveniently claims not to have access to many of the emails we seek. To cut to the chase, the U.S. Capitol Police are hiding a reported 14,000 hours of January 6 video from the American people in order to help Nancy Pelosi’s abusive targeting of Trump’s supporters and other political opponents. Any other police department in America would be investigated and defunded for such abusive secrecy. The Pelosi Congress is in cover-up mode regarding January 6. As you know, we are conducting an extensive investigation into the January 6 events in Washington, DC. Earlier this month, we uncovered [=] documents from Washington, DC’s Office of the Chief Medical Examiner (OCME) related to Air Force veteran and San Diego native Ashli Babbitt. These documents reveal that OCME submitted a request for permission to cremate Babbitt only two days after taking custody of her body and that due to the “high profile nature” of Babbitt’s case, Deputy Chief Medical Examiner Francisco Diaz requested that a secure electronic file with limited access be created for Babbitt’s records. Additionally, Babbitt’s fingerprints were emailed to a person supposedly working for the DC government, which resulted in Microsoft “undeliverable” messages written in Chinese characters being returned. In July, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [==] against the DOJ for records of communication between the FBI and several financial institutions about the reported transfer of financial transactions made by people in DC, Maryland and Virginia on January 5 and January 6, 2021. The FBI refused to confirm or deny any such records exist. Also in July, Judicial Watch filed a lawsuit [==] against the U.S. Postal Service (USPS) for information relating to the tracking and collecting of Americans’ social media posts through its Internet Covert Operations Program (iCOP). In May, we sued [=] both the Department of the Interior and the Department of Defense for records regarding the deployment of armed forces around the Capitol complex in Washington, D.C., in January and February of 2021. In March, we sued the District of Columbia for the autopsy of Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick and related records. Pressure from this lawsuit helped lead to the disclosure that Capitol Police Officer Brian Sicknick died of natural causes [=]. Also in March, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [==] against the U.S. Department of Defense for records about House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s January 8, 2021, telephone call with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Mark Milley. Once again, Judicial Watch is doing the heavy lifting that a Congress, a media, and an honest executive branch also ought to be doing! JUDICIAL WATCH SEEKS BIDEN PENTAGON EMAILS ON ‘COUNTERING EXTREMISM WORKING GROUP’ Our military is now in an ideological war with itself. It is undergoing an ideological purge, endorsed by President Biden’s appointed Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin. We wanted to know more CRT-themed agenda targeting our troops, so we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Defense seeking records of communications from Austin, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley, and Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff John Hyten regarding the Pentagon’s Countering Extremism Working Group (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [==. 1:21-cv-02145)). We sued here in DC after the Pentagon failed to reply to our May 7, 2021, FOIA request, in which we asked for the following public records: All emails exchanged between Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil referencing “Countering Extremism Working Group” and/or “CEWG.” All emails exchanged between Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil referencing “Countering Extremism Working Group” and/or “CEWG.” All emails exchanged between Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. John Hyten and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil referencing “Countering Extremism Working Group” and/or “CEWG." During his Senate confirmation [==] hearing in January, which followed the January 6 disturbance at the U.S. Capitol building, Austin vowed that he would purge the U.S. military of “racists and extremists.” Austin told the Senate Armed Services Committee, “The job of the Department of Defense is to keep America safe from our enemies. But we can’t do that if some of those enemies lie within our own ranks.” On February 3, Austin ordered [==] a 60-day military stand down to address the “challenge of extremism in the ranks.” Austin established [=] the Countering Extremism Working Group (CEWG) on April 9. Austin selected Bishop Garrison, Senior Advisor to the Secretary of Defense on Human Capital and Diversity, Equity and Inclusion, to head up the CEWG. The effort has been criticized [==] as a racialized vehicle to attack supporters of President Trump and others who espouse conservative views. In July 2019, Garrison tweeted [==] of then-President Donald Trump: Silence from our Congressional leaders is complicity. He is only going to get worse from here, & his party and its leadership are watching it happen while doing nothing to stop it. Support for him, a racist, is support for ALL his beliefs. He's dragging a lot of bad actors (misogynists, extremists, other racists) out into the light, normalizing their actions. If you support the President, you support that. There is no room for nuance with this. There is no more “but I'm not like that” talk. This week’s Afghanistan humiliation is further evidence that the Biden Pentagon’s obsession with targeting conservatives in the military undermines our national security. Why is the Pentagon’s leadership hiding records about its ongoing political purge and attack on the First Amendment rights of our troops? TEXAS SUPREME COURT ASKED TO REVIEW SUIT FOR DOCS ON QATARI FUNDING OF TEXAS A&M We have long investigated [] the role of unfriendly foreign governments in American universities, and it hasn’t abated. One might suppose that there is just too much money involved. The latest example is the nation of Qatar. We filed a petition for review [==] with the Supreme Court of Texas regarding a lawsuit on behalf of our client Zachor Legal Institute under the Texas Public Information Act (TPIA), seeking records about potential influence by the Qatar government’s funding of certain Texas A&M University programs at its campus in Education City, Al Rayyan, Qatar (Zachor Legal Institute, v. Qatar Foundation For Education, Science And Community Development [=. 21-0542)) Zachor Legal Institute is a U.S.-based advocacy group dedicated to combatting the spread of anti-Semitism. Zachor made two requests under the Texas Public Information Act for information about the funding or donations made to Texas A&M by the government of Qatar and agencies and subdivisions of the government of Qatar. Qatar controversially has aligned itself with Islamic terrorists and extremists [==], which has placed it at odds with the United States, Israel and other U.S. allies in the Middle East. Zachor began asking two years ago for information about Qatari funding of Texas A&M research and how Texas A&M, a public university, was able to establish a degree-conferring campus in Qatar without the Texas Legislature’s permission or involvement. In 2003 Texas A&M established a campus in Qatar that now grants Bachelor of Science degrees [] in Chemical Engineering, Electrical and Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Petroleum Engineering. Since 2011, advanced degrees have been offered in Chemical Engineering. Texas A&M at Qatar has awarded more than 1000 degrees [] since 2007. In October 2018, Qatar filed suit against the Texas attorney general to prevent the disclosure of its funding information. On April 29, 2019, we filed a petition [=] to intervene on behalf of Zachor. We contend that a key issue, in this case, is the proper interpretation of the TPIA [Texas Public Information Act], an important statute governing the public’s right to access public information. We are asking the court to interpret whether the act waives the Attorney General’s immunity from being sued – not by a governmental body seeking to withhold information but by a private entity (Qatar Foundation) wishing to have public information kept secret – or “whether the governmental body that holds the information and has the duty to release it" must be the party filing the lawsuit. The Texas Attorney General ruled that Texas A&M could withhold only the donors’ identifying information but must release the other requested information. The Qatar Foundation filed a suit challenging the Attorney General’s opinion. The Honorable Karin Crump, presiding Judge of the 200th Judicial District Court of Travis County, dismissed the Qatar Foundation’s claims on jurisdictional grounds leaving the Attorney General’s opinion intact. The Qatar Foundation appealed to the Texas Court of Appeals, Third District, at Austin, Texas. The court reversed the district court’s jurisdictional order and remanded the case to the district court for further proceedings. Zachor is now asking the Texas Supreme Court to grant its petition for review and render judgment that Qatar Foundation’s lawsuit to keep this public information secret is jurisdictionally barred. As we point out in our petition, the U.S. Congressional Research Service has found serious issues worthy of investigation with Qatar’s involvement in discrimination and terrorism: The Qatari government has been identified as a vocal purveyor of anti-Semitism and promoter of extremist terrorist groups. The merits of this case ask whether the Qatar Foundation (a private entity) will be allowed to use the (Texas Public Information Act) to preclude public scrutiny of its involvement with and influence on a public university. Marc Greendorfer, president of Zachor Legal Institute, said, “When Zachor first submitted the public records request, we were concerned that foreign governments were using United States’ university campuses as breeding grounds for hate and indoctrination. With the dramatic and rapid explosion of antisemitism and anti-American unrest that have spread on campuses since we submitted the request, our concerns are only amplified. We urge the Texas Supreme Court to allow Zachor, and the people of the State of Texas, to see what Qatar is trying to hide.” The Qatari government has been misusing our nation’s courts to hide the details of its controversial funding of Texas A & M University. We hope the Texas Supreme Court puts a stop to this. DEPOSITION ORDERED FOR MAYOR LIGHTFOOT’S OFFICE OVER HER RACIST INTERVIEW POLICY There’s been an important development in our legal battle against Chicago’s mayor. A federal court ordered the deposition of a representative of Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s office in our lawsuit over her discriminatory interview policy. In doing so, the court rejected arguments by the mayor’s lawyers against discovery and to dismiss the legal challenge. We filed a motion for limited jurisdictional discovery [] after Mayor Lightfoot’s office once again changed its explanation about when and how she would only grant interviews to “journalists of color.” Only after we filed our lawsuit and the mayor had to defend her actions in court did the public learn that the racially biased criteria only applied to a purported “press tour.” On May 27, 2021, we filed a civil rights lawsuit [=] on behalf of the Daily Caller News Foundation and reporter Thomas Catenacci against Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot for violating their First Amendment Rights and Catenacci’s right to equal protection under the Fourteenth Amendment (Catenacci et al v. Lightfoot [] (No. 1:21-cv-02852)). Christine Svenson of Svenson Law Offices in Palatine, Illinois, is assisting us with the lawsuit. Catenacci, a white male, emailed Mayor Lightfoot’s office requesting a one-on-one interview with the mayor. The office never replied to the request or to multiple follow up emails from Catenacci. The civil rights lawsuit argues that Lightfoot purposefully discriminated against Catenacci “because of his race by stating that she would only grant interview requests from ‘journalists of color....’” “America’s civil rights heroes must be turning over in their graves because of the overt racism now openly embraced by so many on the far left in America, including Chicago’s Mayor Lightfoot. We are optimistic the courts will agree that government officials are still not allowed to discriminate in America,” Daily Caller News Foundation President Neil Patel said. “I look forward to understanding how the mayor's office implemented such a discriminatory policy. My rights, and the First Amendment rights of countless other reporters in America, must not be trampled upon,” Thomas Catenacci said. We’re pleased by the federal court ruling requiring a representative of Mayor Lightfoot to explain, under oath, the scope and nature of her racist interview policy. Until next week ... name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166683:6Ph5o0lNG:m:1:3253819041:0C383A3D30FEFBB61BAE622A442595C7:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
---
---
| |
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Peter, | Joe Biden gave Afghanistan to the Taliban ... abandoning tens of thousands of our citizens and allies to brutal terrorists. Then, he went on vacation. Joe Biden is unfit to serve as Commander-in-Chief, and I'm calling on you--as a patriot--to "sign the petition demanding his Cabinet REMOVE him from office under the 25th Amendment." | | | | Don't let the media fool you: this has nothing to do with whether the U.S. should have left Afghanistan. It's about how Joe Biden so badly bungled this mission andfailed to protect our allies, our people, and our military secrets. Or as Barack Obama once put it, " Don't underestimate Joe's ability to f things up." Joe Biden has disgraced our nation, betrayed our allies, and destroyed all international trust in America... and then, he refused to take responsibility. "American patriots must hold him accountable. Sign the petition to DEMAND the Cabinet REMOVE Joe Biden from office under the 25th Amendment >>" | | | | Thanks, Candace This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Rand Paul
subject: When did YouTube start working for the government?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166810:JAcZw0lNh:m:1:3253819041:7E08D1670F86C10353C9F019CA2AE9D5:r) | |
---
Peter, YouTube and Google have become an entity so huge that they think they are the arbiter of truth.

And when I spoke out about the complete absurdity of mask mandates, they responded.

By banning me on YouTube for 7 days. **[FIGHT BACK>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166810:JAcZw0lNh:m:1:3253819041:7E08D1670F86C10353C9F019CA2AE9D5:r)**

As a libertarian-leaning senator, I think private companies have the right to ban me if they want to. But I think it is really anti-free speech, anti-progress of science, and it's really unhelpful to the overall conversation.

Both sides _should_ be able to present facts on either side of a question and complete an adversarial process to reach the truth.

But that's just not what's happening these days in big tech.

I'm not sure when YouTube became an arm of the government... but I am sure that it is an absolute disgrace for our government to proceed with their nonsense, anti-science policies without any repercussions or push back.

_They shouldn 't be protected by big tech giants._

If you agree, please chip in today to fight the censorship and share the truth: **[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-2741522/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58166810:JAcZw0lNh:m:1:3253819041:7E08D1670F86C10353C9F019CA2AE9D5:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
---

| | Peter \-- Yesterday, we emailed you about CNN's latest rankings and where Georgia Democrat Raphael Warnock stands. **Warnock's seat was listed as the second-most-likely seat to flip in 2022 \-- and alt-right millionaire Kelly Loeffler is being recruited to run against him.** We set a mid-month goal of $2,500 to save this seat \-- and your support has been overwhelming! _We've raised $1,825 so far._ But Loeffler won't be the only alt-right extremist Warnock is up against in 2022. Just yesterday, Proud Boys supporter and domestic terrorist Edward Florea pleaded guilty to threatening the life of Sen. Warnock on social media. Here are just a few things we know about Florea:
* Florea wrote: **“** **Warnock is going to have a hard time casting votes for communist policies when he's swinging with the ... fish.”**
* He followed it up by writing, **“Dead men can't pass laws.”**
* When federal agents raided Florea's apartment, they found **more than 1,000 rounds of ammunition, plus hatchets, swords and 75 military-style combat knives.**

Florea is just one example of the right-wing extremism coming from the Republican Party today \-- and that proves that we must protect Sen. Warnock and his seat in the Senate at all costs. **[**That's why we're increasing our original goal to raise $5,000 by midnight tonight and doubling down on our efforts. name: James Carville
subject: Trump's last stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
Trump’s endorsement is a wake up call for all of us.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424804/301927723/-2023814932?refcode=20210821.1_JC_8CO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFmOTIyMi04ODAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VscXS0DOt0WYFN-1FFvXNJfWcpcwFie_xKWxAnPg3u0=)

| | Derek,

I’m going to level with you: Trump-backed candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, poses the biggest threat to Virginia’s progress in a generation.

If he wins, that’s the ball game. Everything from Virginia’s health care to our freedom to vote will be in danger.

Derek, we have to make sure Terry McAuliffe has everything he needs to stop Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin.

**[Terry needs to raise $1 million before the end of August -- can you chip in right now and do your part?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424805/301927724/1097049879?refcode=20210821.1_JC_8CO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFmOTIyMi04ODAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VscXS0DOt0WYFN-1FFvXNJfWcpcwFie_xKWxAnPg3u0=)**

Here’s another sad fact. Youngkin winning ain’t just bad for Virginia, it’s a nightmare for America.

Donald Trump endorsed Youngkin and Glenn is shouting that endorsement from the rooftops. In fact, Youngkin is so much like Trump that folks are starting to call him “Glenn Trumpkin.”

Look, I don’t care what you call him. All I care about is what election experts are calling Virginia: 2021’s most important race.

Derek, we worked too damn hard to fire Donald Trump for us to let him resurrect his political career by helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s next Governor.

**[I’m counting on you to do your part to stop them. Youngkin is planning on spending $75 million of his own money to win and any contribution, no matter the amount, would be a huge help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424806/301927726/1097049879?refcode=20210821.1_JC_8CO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFmOTIyMi04ODAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VscXS0DOt0WYFN-1FFvXNJfWcpcwFie_xKWxAnPg3u0=)**

Thanks,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424807/301927728/-2023814932?refcode=20210821.1_JC_8CO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmFmOTIyMi04ODAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VscXS0DOt0WYFN-1FFvXNJfWcpcwFie_xKWxAnPg3u0=)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'm asking you, here and now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424855/301927882/683353327?refcode=20210821_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFmZDdjMi04OTAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lu7IVcNfSNjbHZVAORCqd5xIdKV7P1e0JoCuWWt1D7c=) Friend – my team just let me know that we're falling incredibly short of our critical midnight fundraising goal. If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach this goal and raise what we need _now_. The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and _The New York Times_ reports that I'm the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement. I won't let them – but I need your help. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money – and unlike GOP megadonors, I don't have millions to sink into my campaign. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. That means hitting critical fundraising goals like this one. **So I'll be direct, friend: I'm asking you to make a contribution – here and now – toward our midnight fundraising goal before it's too late. This will be one of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle, and we simply can't afford to fall behind before we even get started.** [**Please, I need folks like you by my side: Will you give $15 or more right now – split between my campaign and Seth Moulton – to keep Georgia blue and defend our Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34424856/301927883/683353327?refcode=20210821_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzFmZDdjMi04OTAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lu7IVcNfSNjbHZVAORCqd5xIdKV7P1e0JoCuWWt1D7c=) This team has helped us beat the odds before, and I know we can do it again. Thanks so much for fighting alongside me. — Raphael Warnock

If you have a second, I'd like to tell you why it's so essential to our campaign – and our progressive future – that we reach this goal and raise what we need now. The truth is that the odds are against us. With the Senate split 50-50, the GOP needs to flip just one seat to retake control for Mitch McConnell, and The New York Times reports that I'm the most vulnerable Senate Democrat in the entire country. Republicans are coming after me as their top target for defeat – and they've already started launching attack ads to try and crush our people-powered movement. I won't let them – but I need your help. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money – and unlike GOP megadonors, I don't have millions to sink into my campaign. I've got this grassroots team – and right now, the only way I can fight back against these attacks and defend my seat is with your urgent support. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: SIGN ON: Take bold action on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Add your name if you agree that Congress must act urgently to combat the climate crisis
#

Team,
July was the hottest month on planet earth. I’m not exaggerating or trying to scare you — that’s just a fact.
And if we don’t take bold action soon to mitigate the climate crisis, things are only going to be worse, especially for working families like yours and mine.
But we can do something about it. Congress will soon be taking up some critical legislation on our fight against climate change.
[Will you join me in demanding that Congress pass bold measures to address the most existential threat of our time? It takes less than two minutes to add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34429456/301936175/-1283052340?refcode2=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQyMjE4My05MDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNogti8OU4T6W8pSjlCtyQehv8NXasI5-294uDUCYFk=&emci=34bf8e65-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34429461/301936181/-1283052340?refcode2=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQyMjE4My05MDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNogti8OU4T6W8pSjlCtyQehv8NXasI5-294uDUCYFk=&emci=34bf8e65-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18034979)**
Last week, the United Nations' Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) released a groundbreaking report on how the climate crisis is having a catastrophic effect on our planet.
And there’s no question about it. The evidence of global warming and climate change is all around us; from extreme heat, to wildfires, to unprecedented flooding.
But I have some good news. With President Biden in the White House, and Democrats in control of the House and the Senate, we have our best chance at taking bold action to save ourselves and future generations from this crisis.
We can stop giving enormous tax breaks to polluting fossil fuel companies, impose a moratorium on fracking, and instead double down on creating good American union jobs in clean energy.
This isn’t just about protecting the environment — it’s about rebuilding our infrastructure stronger, and putting millions of people back to work in green union jobs that will pay a living wage.
I can’t stress this enough, though: It’s on us to make sure they follow through. And we absolutely cannot afford to wait.
[So, what do you say? Will you add your name if you agree that Congress must act urgently to combat the climate crisis?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34429465/301936185/-1283052340?refcode2=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQyMjE4My05MDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNogti8OU4T6W8pSjlCtyQehv8NXasI5-294uDUCYFk=&emci=34bf8e65-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18034979)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34429468/301936187/-1283052340?refcode2=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWQyMjE4My05MDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tNogti8OU4T6W8pSjlCtyQehv8NXasI5-294uDUCYFk=&emci=34bf8e65-f101-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4ed22183-9002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18034979)**
As always, thank you for your support.
Together,
Malcolm

name: Erica Smith
subject: I stood at our border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Right at the Virginia-North Carolina state line.
#
Hi, it's Erica.
Good news: **We’re more than halfway through our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_!** I CAN’T believe we’ve come this far since we launched the tour back in June.
[**_Can you make a donation of $10, $5, or even $3 to help fund the rest of the _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_? Your contribution helps pay for things like PPE, gas in the campaign van, and venue space as we continue meeting thousands of North Carolina voters across the state during our tour._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
**[Contribute »](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)**
Thanks to the online grassroots support we’ve received so far, we recently completed another major leg of our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_.
We made some great stops last weekend in Orange, Rowan, and Cumberland Counties. Thank you all so much for the warm welcomes! I was glad to spend time outdoors.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
In Alleghany County, I stood right at the Virginia-North Carolina state border. Last November, Virginia voters won legal marijuana for their state. Shouldn’t we do the same in North Carolina?
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
We also stopped to speak with voters at the Duplin Winery in Duplin County. I'm grateful to everyone who pulled up.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
Rural communities like the ones I'm visiting need a voice in North Carolina. Issues like polluting CAFOs, rural broadband, and the closure of rural hospitals call for immediate action. As a United States Senator, I will take immediate action.
**Heck, elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I could even be the deciding YES vote on urgent policies like the Green New Deal, universal broadband, and Medicare for All!**
But I can’t get there — or finish our _100 Counties, 100 Days Tour_ — without your grassroots support.
[**_If it makes sense for your budget, can you make a donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? Ours is one of the most competitive Senate races of 2022, so let’s deliver a win for our Democratic majority and for our progressive movement._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/10715?refcode=em20210821-363&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210821-363-footer&t=26&refcode2=363_3698_W5zQpf&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=27&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=363%2E3698%2EW5zQpf)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

It seems like every day we learn more and more about the involvement of the Treason Caucus in Donald Trump's attempt to overthrow the results of the 2020 election.

Just last week, _CNN_ reported that Representative Scott Perry (PA) connected Trump to a Department of Justice official, Jeffrey Clark, who was receptive to the false claims of voter fraud. Trump even came close to replacing the acting attorney general, Jeffrey Rosen, with Clark.

That's not all. Perry passed along documents to the DOJ that alleged there was voter fraud in PA and Trump mentioned him by name in a call where he told officials to "Just say the election was corrupt + leave the rest to me and the R. Congressmen."

It's clear that Scott Perry was instrumental in Trump's plans to attack our democracy and he's spent his time since then trying to avoid accountability. It's no wonder why he voted against creating an independent commission to investigate the January 6 Capitol attack.

As Nancy Pelosi's select committee investigation is underway, we need to let Scott Perry know that the American people demand answers. That's why we're making calls and sending emails to his office so he hears our message loud and clear.

**[Will you take a moment to call or email Rep. Scott Perry and let him know that you want the truth about the attack on our democracy? body:
The election is right around the corner
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34433447/301953978/-2023814932?refcode=20210821.2_TM_8CP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGJiZDZmYi05YTAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nc_bnvg7C7sxV9XCrhnx71SEmm9La8X2IXetDhNa_MU=)

| | Derek, I can’t believe it.

Less than one month from today, early voting starts, and Virginians will officially begin casting ballots in the most important election in the country.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have an important ask for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruRK9uo52V9sax5lKPRtmidef_ZBJ9L_xE_7uJAIbkKG-6HXjyJ3m27h6afKQeDtHs9bAw3G0DR75Z2ENOZUhUqNAUHYCtfS0wofy2PF-VYnb5HVxFLpEfn6QBZptldO6YA5oDG3wpAf0cyBesKuJpkHTsAj_t1-4ByonOCLRqb26XcVVs_cs6JpmrEpdIYiwYhIENViR6U5jUtB-2AaIABYbxo5f-wU-o0DA7-06KRthNAWAX_44-KB5goLCsvTEXucUHLO8hYxywfBm8cL-4_M/3en/BqbGPn-PQSWNPfRscjq7UA/h0/mT2fOR0EMeFFs3XqMlWgbhYHPObIl_fRKN8TZKv3UnE)
This is Rep. Adam Schiff, team. I have a lot to say. But first I have an important ask for you:

**[Will you split a contribution right now between Common Good VA and Charlie Crist’s campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruRK9uo52V9sax5lKPRtmiddOEsOd7yjEoEa5Ropm_c02pNaflZtp6H0g1WSRg7RdFaL0VW1qvOwKvZrE2ycPgiqGDSql7tP5YbjAyMrc3MkJ7U455afu4aGsmKS5TJutOfklklhYtxgIg0HVYP7kHn-uBBz0EXoJYD_YKoujNqahDAIGV7lEncGZ1pT3H9q1n_y6VvgLtV2SgGo1uJTgmMWMAWbZC_We5NyYnP6sB_1Xt7fn9lUdMTest7Ld04Js14amYYBZuWAeHQ-Qz1YLICE/3en/BqbGPn-PQSWNPfRscjq7UA/h1/XHYkT2rddOfjThfT9Xzq9Bexj0J_D3VG0u0eE2oCuJM) Every dollar is critical to helping defeat Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and helping my friend Charlie raise $15,000 before fundraising deadline.**

I’ve known Charlie for a long time. We’ve served together in Congress and worked together on critical legislation to help families across America. He and I worked side by side to pass the COVID-19 relief packages and legislation to protect voting rights. I know his character. I’ve seen his work ethic. And he would fight for Floridians in the Governor’s mansion just as he has for years in Congress.

On the flip side, I know a lot about Ron DeSantis, too. Not through working together – but by seeing him stand side by side with the most dangerous president in history. Seeing him grin while signing voter suppression bills in Florida. **And by watching him jockey to use his platform to be the successor to Donald Trump in 2024.**

Things haven’t gotten much better since DeSantis left the House to become Governor of Florida. He’s put more attention into building his profile and trying to disenfranchise voters in his state than trying to help the people of Florida recover from the worst pandemic any of us have ever endured.

**It’s absolutely critical that we defeat DeSantis.** And I believe my friend Charlie is the one to beat him next year. But knowing the modern-day Republican Party, they are going to do everything they can to keep DeSantis in office and tear down Charlie as he seeks to represent the people of Florida.

**So right now, your contribution is critical. Charlie is ready to set the tone for the race and he needs your help to do it.[Please split a donation between Charlie’s campaign and Common Good VA today to help them hit their $15,000 goal.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruRK9uo52V9sax5lKPRtmiddRsPHkPwvMtUqO5IrwL9ER7HebOGObVSKeqFlAqxSzEIpUhT3MTkCJvTRhN0EHFKVACeQiwKso0qlhHK1TO6yq_PKkAuH0GMJ6FecCkBK1D2W6Jj9T4yYt2hXqfS3DB7cs78pT7antE4146PzvHuGzSNB7dp9SKQaJHiUzKnYwngpt3hphluQAOj3wlx3MZsEwjwnCJ7V-0zaMlX-rB6f8QbvZxuQmgZ-kEcdPO29hRnsfNkwbv9vkVEg5aigLX4s/3en/BqbGPn-PQSWNPfRscjq7UA/h2/AD1_HeoW1OYgf1_z--9gIKZ-eU5IgZ1jhmFHSZW-MxY)**

We need to flip Florida blue once again. And you can play a role in that today. Thank you for all you do.

\-- Adam Schiff
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruRK9uo52V9sax5lKPRtmidcCVlRfqcJoibmoPmFPj4lee2pUED4PDeSHiqzIGCTy6Z93sTgC66zMyxDQm1RdR4f-c9aw9F_V-wUDdGD_JlWM6tdpH-qCfONKoVZJYAN6lCAr-seKnKfGVzOjnoIBwF436JsK7Qu5x8UPPVKqBo5whV-aHJOEAQ6SYtbXOu7QhkQ3y8wrfj7iCwIGin_MjRBuyP4KI3t3vQLx4RI8UAtIXAD5vuVM3lslyLxK2JJQp0kjeYQSP_FIdtgjkb4YSTo/3en/BqbGPn-PQSWNPfRscjq7UA/h3/k3KddXeUxCHuhttfQ8Ry7oTCIfL9312G-8zbnWe58lE)

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: obstacles
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
We need to be honest...

Earlier this week, we reached out about the fundraising challenges facing Cheri and all African American women who run for Congress, and we’re determined to change it.
Here’s the bottom line: **On average, African American women running for Congress raised only about HALF of what white candidates raised according to the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis.**
That’s outrageous, but this is a real challenge we could face in this campaign unless we all do our part to support Cheri.
**[Make a $3 donation right now to send Cheri Beasley to the Senate to fight for justice for all North Carolinians. It matters who is at the decision-making table in Congress, and we can trust Cheri to be a voice for all of us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34434036/301955864/-928165870?refcode2=e580f5cf-9d02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTgwZjVjZi05ZDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHgd8uwXAOJvmh6sFhuQqJQpCzh-WlFipzgvvZvvrEM=)**
\- Team Beasley
* * *
Right now, there are zero African American women in the Senate, and we need to be honest about some of the reasons for that.
One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising.
In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, **"The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate."**
**[If you're ready to help us change this statistic, make a $3 donation to our campaign today. We have an incredible opportunity to bring new leadership by electing Cheri, but it will require all of us to play a part.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34434037/301955865/-928165870?refcode2=e580f5cf-9d02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTgwZjVjZi05ZDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHgd8uwXAOJvmh6sFhuQqJQpCzh-WlFipzgvvZvvrEM=)**
Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win.
**The fact is we know not only can Cheri win, but she is Democrats’ best chance to flip this seat. She leads in primary polling and is the only Democrat who has won statewide before.**
So we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if Cheri has what it takes to win.
**[Will you please consider making a $3 donation to help us make history by electing Cheri as North Carolina’s first African American Senator? Cheri is a trailblazer, and with our help, she will win North Carolina and be a voice for all of us in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34434038/301955866/-928165870?refcode2=e580f5cf-9d02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTgwZjVjZi05ZDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHgd8uwXAOJvmh6sFhuQqJQpCzh-WlFipzgvvZvvrEM=)**
The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian.
\- Team Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34434039/301955867/-928165870?refcode2=e580f5cf-9d02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210821-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTgwZjVjZi05ZDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KHgd8uwXAOJvmh6sFhuQqJQpCzh-WlFipzgvvZvvrEM=)**

clean_body: We need to be honest... Earlier this week, we reached out about the fundraising challenges facing Cheri and all African American women who run for Congress, and we’re determined to change it. Here’s the bottom line: On average, African American women running for Congress raised only about HALF of what white candidates raised according to the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis. That’s outrageous, but this is a real challenge we could face in this campaign unless we all do our part to support Cheri. = \- Team Beasley Right now, there are zero African American women in the Senate, and we need to be honest about some of the reasons for that. One of the biggest obstacles that African American women running for office must confront is fundraising. In 2018, the Center for Responsive Politics’ analysis said, "The average Black female candidate raised 46 percent less than the average white male candidate, but she also raised 55 percent less than the average white female candidate." = Too often the traditional gatekeepers and political establishment have doubted the ability of African American women to win. The fact is we know not only can Cheri win, but she is Democrats’ best chance to flip this seat. She leads in primary polling and is the only Democrat who has won statewide before. So we have to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to compete and challenge any question of if Cheri has what it takes to win. = The obstacles we face in this campaign may be daunting at times, but together, we can overcome them and open the doors of opportunity for every North Carolinian. \- Team Beasley = Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Maggie Hassan is working hard to deliver for ALL Americans, friend.
1. **Helping pass the American Rescue Plan** – which has put our economy back on track, supported small businesses, and helped families recover.
2. **Leading efforts to end surprise medical billing** by working across party lines to pass the STOP Surprise Medical Bills Act.
3. **Working to secure and pass the bipartisan infrastructure package** – bringing historic investments in high-speed internet, roads and bridges, clean water, and more to New Hampshire and the rest of the country.

If we lose Maggie’s voice in the Senate, we'll lose one of the strongest advocates for families – as well as the Senate majority. name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168629:6cLRc0lnN:m:1:3253819041:9B1DA2B8DBA465B76F78BE65863DF8C5:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
