clean_body: Where are you?! | Joe Biden is ruining our country! He’s opened our borders, closed our schools, and left thousands of American Citizens to fend for themselves against the Taliban. Plus, he’s letting the socialist “squad” in Congress have free-reign to undermine our election laws, end private property rights, and explode the deficit with trillions in new debt. That’s why this rally is such a big deal, Peter. President Trump’s can turn everything around and build momentum towards a Republican LANDSLIDE in the Midterm Elections, but only if every Republican stands by his side. | | With this much on the line, we’re not holding anything back. Republicans have set abold goal of raising $1 MILLION before President Trump takes the stage to show that we’re 100% behind him in the fight to SAVE AMERICA. 🇺🇸 This is a huge moment that we can’t afford to miss, Peter. | | | | | | | | | Thank you. President Donald J. Trump Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: 6 years ago today, the good guys won.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8MoTr2MjSewy-7LIRDw9eVTKDMz8i9qL5GuHQf1k6Sgp2G-CN7IcZ_o_snPqTS5b2mkpZLcbyOYyz02cG78MrNOT6zDK3bw6aJMmljgk8BUHRQMvagBUGGJDTNQFFgLZsT65-D2WQmWyUcIJ3mNi9VnGLaF2ooiCcpp9C3Sj8MjGlh-odveuKWh_aHLNDbxLc6O3zVyrfn_T6abtgw-FSHH)
---
Peter,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**Today marks six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

[](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8MyBg3opcC0WM0nNWWlekCNCVwoaXwvwnApIUllK4DHnQGCk5e3jkPBvGGbh1Bzxyp3U8UUuhwFX-bEeuAgFhnyxL2sOR2VExdZ3ve9W3crRbmbH94TjllaL1tP36PNMYFMAbBTlZZE3OidvWnWrCI5ZgVe9-sANm3ndVyezOa9w76rYhnZ4BI1sNnOy1WNbwukbwzeZpUOOAH3N9-hS0RI)
I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8NktygjfHBusChGAnh2Sfp-zmy_p0t4Qt2Ib4HgONS3W2HkkJxLAGXXnRvGB0hB3jDTO7jEjnoBTMMSnCNpacqCzm7sdTd-bXKtgko8YM6fBCBHTTlJkAltHI0UOeOU_E8lrpwFBFaj-h-b3B-in6Hl1ch3BpAtHWbIaH6SyEgMgUVYGRkvZahoLGdnWWpXMi9_TlIz5T-YGjEbTjXtCZYY)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8PCChJVLeov84C5p0ckxxv3h-W8EQEbe17M74wHA4E1KD-16oF97J3BeNPQGgckNmD_eFKUJL9ghC8ZaHhl5I7R2cv2xlRfx2letEDNwgD0gtrAAzZ1KmhJA5piNhRmHbDUZuSNN8kKEM34NtUYz8H2skH7UdwGr0hpyfsaiKosEE2HRmFJGngW8DXooMYdVXSDJUeSuflsVmmub8fFO4oM)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8OYkoai7Co6OBppsrHS20fGSQ5JajeRuutaCvlonOaNNZFHFFNqdJuOAfaz2EKnruzDNhb6NhEgs9iwHJbiARJNn8o1KOiNObqX88ayLnCqadRsqw4qLLrTcrUH0SgL3mqJAuFr5ONnv33hkVBC8gBrR487Yz_uP2WkH-xTF49JlhmnDMfvnAnUcmBH2-vja9_0cqf2LbT1qzMzPpPMfYww)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8O_9pxxPx4RFMz97_XqhATvAkNPgu7oXt2T-4_aiqblZ_5oC90GrNVAUug-ZPrpB7-0AAZ8qCaiu6ZA99nUh5KxVjyI13VOb3znVYrbgwg5ueyyb0eLqOkH2rlokXc3d9kOnK_NGeCmVFByeTn4vigvD_VkPtd6O-FCMePraaV_iQooebvOgg4qAPdWo5kIs11z2_fuORhpT0kI4EdwGVF-)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1e833d54524746e9b33cf32f5c1ebf39&_e=SO-uexqXcsYqntwXPukgPrDfcNKl_JlZziviN6Om3uD_Jv2i6Q-GiepR_sMb8yKOtwcX_4_FAJ_mm2F78i4HER89c73adgL_H47-OWx1NtQiUMZ2q4LX9qVx3781k7G9Z5FInhxgpK-PbYWDIPGdGIcY8nDNYnBWSUjl7WH7JrjGiDLQ6R90pm8GaxpZovlwqn4QzebZZyKs9U2RtUO4aVJn1zPSxP4pkKKNLoqkQ8MbkYQWbu0yBzqNlFG1hzYJel8gZ3k-HyE48W8QFerabJS1XBTFmunfbA9wNoJ9jc-Dm6J5ybOqxGkvAofa1dOkC2D35RYALu-aR1HYk4sBl-IZ0L8E0hjh7SR6I3lqr--915qR2AyDAFuUdQ9U0myVJf2xuq-lcIdK8bIARg-hQW27pfTrDAqb14Izo8y6yknT04bH6U_O48KnMo3iLR22)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. clean_body: A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... Today marks six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. - Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. Hello there,

As a member of Mike Braun’s Finance Team, I thought it was appropriate to send a memo regarding the nation’s current economic crisis. Senator Braun has been focusing on our nation’s economic status and is deeply concerned about Democrat-led inflation.

_We have put together some key economic data for your awareness:_

• U.S. inflation is hovering around 5.4%.
• The national debt is approaching $29 trillion.
• Democrats plan to forge ahead with a $3.5 trillion infrastructure bill -- a surefire inflation nightmare.

The bottom line: Democrats don’t care about our national debt. They never have and they never will. Democratic socialism would cost $42.5 trillion in its first decade.

**Inflation is a hidden tax slamming hardworking, lower- and middle-income families the hardest: That’s hardworking Hoosier families being harmed the most.

Reckless government spending by the Biden Administration and his allies in Congress is driving up the cost of living.**

**_[Democrats want to TAX, TAX, TAX AND SPEND, SPEND, SPEND.](http://links.mikebraunsenate.com/u/click?_t=f3dfddd5a2ed4356955cd9c969d3b9e3&_m=d7fdcdff0468425481388a9b01d05818&_e=b6B-_EhTtRld3B62aSAJGsnLM_oKDulDqkCk-VLYniIpokZhIixmMepLG2tJjBU3rhR1DLMaCeTeOZ2W7Zne-BCRVW3W9BZQqi791lCKRvgYZsqoqQNF0o280noPy_dH1wcc8zseiQhOXrIXaAzAGDJdTbNmHYzmd8Szd4QH-oQ6-4b9U8suaycbCGaOR6MHyhIdGc6pfDn6keNh0QUWW1sE_SERheSNGBG0TbSO6GuzMFi8HMAaVEtYvprLGCiC0ClRGMWru8l5QGWR2xMeakhzl1EL-95XBXdaIQO7r4GmPaCQ6ZAidsVQYsLROMEABHen4UTtJmJNeG9T-bk0MPEn1phNeQLzsDWaH-uJj_vzEys3Inw6LkDK7YP6JLVh2fr4xRZ3P1ZCUkipTJXWru-Amn2h7S7RtB4i6n-O_7JoV93YgurP7cEbTHCUydXJjtZCWOJVqrE6MiFR6FjBlL-OHRIMwmlIQvGfIuM_1CY%3D)_**

name: CDR Kirk Lippold (Ret.)
subject: If it is just one, that is one too many.
body:
Right now, as you read this message, there are approximately 22 active duty military or veterans so damaged by what they have witnessed in battle that they will commit suicide by this time tomorrow.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Help22.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)
[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw) Patriot,

Right now, as you read this message, there are approximately 22 active duty military or veterans so damaged by what they have witnessed in battle that they will commit suicide by this time tomorrow.

22\. That isn't an exaggeration. A study by the Department of Veterans Affairs estimates the number of suicides at 22 a day.

**The truth is that just one is one too many.**
[**PLEASE HELP**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)
These military veterans come to believe - wrongly and tragically - that relief from their unbearable psychological suffering will never come.

I'm talking about the kind of hopelessness that erodes, and then erases, one's faith in the healing power of counseling, of love, of time and of God.

And I know what it means to witness the horrors of war.

My name is Commander Kirk Lippold USN (Ret.), and at the summit of my military service, I commanded the USS Cole - the ship that was bombed by al Qaeda terrorists on October 12, 2000, in the Gulf of Aden.

I pulled many bodies from the ocean that day. The memories still haunt me.

But I had one advantage. My father was a psychologist. So, throughout my childhood, I heard my dad answering calls at all times of the day and night from people who needed help - people who didn't commit suicide because he was there to listen. And he was there to kindle hope.

That's why I am writing you today.
**There are tens of thousands of veterans at risk of losing hope and then losing their lives to suicide.** [**PLEASE HELP**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)
For many military men and women, reaching out for the inspiration to go on carries a stigma. They think that if they seek help, it will damage their careers or mark them as "weak" in the eyes of others.

To address this problem, I helped found Help22.
_Help22 is an organization that is challenging life coaches, counselors, social workers, psychiatrists, psychologists, and pastoral counselors around America to donate free counseling and advice to active-duty military and veterans in need._
These professionals have remarkable, effective healing tools at their disposal, and every single hour they donate to veterans in need can save a life. But to accomplish this goal, [**_I need your help_**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw).
[**PLEASE HELP**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)
America's veterans have contributed countless selfless hours, often in distant lands, risking their lives. Unfortunately, **many have been injured** emotionally in profound, invisible, and life-threatening ways.

[**With your help**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw), I intend to recruit mental health professionals across America and, acting as a clearinghouse, to then match them up with military members and veterans emotionally traumatized by war.

Thank you in advance for helping Help22 accomplish our life-or-death mission for those who have given us so much.

Be well and may God Bless,

Commander Kirk Lippold
US Navy (Ret.)

P.S. **_Thousands of active duty and retired military personnel are suffering in shame and silence._** We need to fight this problem head-on - NOW - with every ounce of strength we can muster.

[**Would you please give as much as you can because every dollar we raise will help us kindle life-sustaining hope that can prevent military members from resorting to suicide?**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)
[**PLEASE HELP**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/5Su7LkUtmHYXtfl51gkRaA/BQJqyNIcxxhpzI763CP10kZw)

Help22 is pending as a Tax Exempt Organization Under Section 501(C)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Your Donations will be Tax Deductible As Allowed by Federal Law and the Laws of Various States upon approval.

---
(C) 2021 Illoominate Media
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

Fellow Conservative,

The average donation to the Black Lives Matter Organization in 2020 was $30. **Radical Democrats fooled Americans into donating over 90 MILLION to this racist organization to fund their campaigns.**

These donors contributed thinking their hard-earned money was going towards a racial justice movement seeking to help black communities. **That couldn't be further from the truth...**

[**I am black conservative pastor running for Congress and exposing the TRUTH behind the BLM movement.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d73f961261144d168822598f36f8fcd0&_e=Onr_JtcebySDNpvJgo207415M8b__AqxqvthXtPUDGWBei7eOnMbjYe6OgiTYMbrnLaJwa6tdooIZs5YxnMrBy6sTboKhf99VlDYPAmIZolxbI7ahB_DY6bugpfnGurGx7fSAJzPIq2YRt4lRYkEqy8mI1R_fPa7SZXEeUWNzgrNMxchiLAhtazXPAcGBWEaNSSzdWoymuxPtQF6TNMHHXh7ZdFn61xMJPZjrJon7bKrZSD7V9NB7-Z7SjmnbT9-Tvso7i9R9sOkBhzWn4mmLq8IpWyeHEJ7aZ6R-8esO_nos1xoPJmtDWLUWFHbge3Zx7KXG0nsnfB6-sYmRqB-R6x32LV2udxziEWGWKQ43plqNZgyGc1mxu4vMswqHzAZYMuV3YcGCmToHSSxILxABT0kxIde7DtANiazXseNGdpPUVSpBbVTUrZ4W4lv6N8SW_GhoJySbyoT6VRgXdUVh2nh3JknOrJTlxkF68HUzLk%3D) It's imperative that you understand my story so you can see I have nothing to gain by putting a target on my back...

As a City Councilman, I set my office up right in the heart of my city, on a park bench where my constituents could join me at any point of the day.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d73f961261144d168822598f36f8fcd0&_e=Onr_JtcebySDNpvJgo207415M8b__AqxqvthXtPUDGWBei7eOnMbjYe6OgiTYMbrnLaJwa6tdooIZs5YxnMrBy6sTboKhf99VlDYPAmIZolxbI7ahB_DY6bugpfnGurGx7fSAJzPIq2YRt4lRYkEqy8mI1R_fPa7SZXEeUWNzgrNMxchiLAhtazXPAcGBWEaNSSzdWoymuxPtQF6TNMHHXh7ZdFn61xMJPZjrJon7bKrZSD7V9NB7-Z7SjmnbT9-Tvso7i9R9sOkBhzWn4mmLkQm3JnCphhCd9GddjkWezH7HVmR6uDdV9xOFAjrMGvMWo_LOdukoAaPCKfMTruAsmkCI4deiB-KBcheYi2-eo_2TFlRu3XqwFTiQkX6qT-z_o2L-WxSdpeDSQf9kqN2ukehrlcKHFGxm1VWAtkqY7LryRF6xZkEJDu1VCSXgHz9rNqvasx7c2tyqkQ1iBdr0XTxo7WWNATRHk7-WhAbYAo%3D)
When I saw the homelessness and drug use in my city, I knew I needed to take a stand and clean up the streets where my children now play. **But our Democrat leaders have peddled the idea that the answer to these problems in minority communities are more liberal leaders in Washington.**

**News flash: They're not.** The answer to cleaning up your city is building relationships within your community - something very few politicians do. So, I inserted myself right in the heart of my town, where I can see the problems with my own two eyes and work to fix them with my own two hands.

I have partnered with law enforcement agencies, not attacked them in the name of "social justice" like Democrats across the nation. **And you know what we saw? A SAFER, more UNITED community.**

As a conservative black man, I understand what the Democrats are doing because I know people that have fallen for it. [**As a Congressman, I want to expose the Left for their race-hustling agenda and show Americans that unity and investing in your community will truly create change, not more power to Leftist politicians.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d73f961261144d168822598f36f8fcd0&_e=Onr_JtcebySDNpvJgo207415M8b__AqxqvthXtPUDGWBei7eOnMbjYe6OgiTYMbrnLaJwa6tdooIZs5YxnMrBy6sTboKhf99VlDYPAmIZolxbI7ahB_DY6bugpfnGurGx7fSAJzPIq2YRt4lRYkEqy8mI1R_fPa7SZXEeUWNzgrNMxchiLAhtazXPAcGBWEaNSSzdWoymuxPtQF6TNMHHXh7ZdFn61xMJPZjrJon7bKrZSD7V9NB7-Z7SjmnbT9-Tvso7i9R9sOkBhzWn4mmLsCBhnGeYggKVEV5QyJf_DRubqy5z2ZnWf0dFi01y628hWJkKejesMOi1qWgdHr5e8_qs7TOIJ7_ZnKlZRyobjiQTKIh3pKviqTDR32lam3A1hMHeiL_AiFTchiWjbeopvLdEVpQqzYQydKtf8dI4qmIOhkTSblez9DjdlnyN54bnYJRX_XjN8Q0Ix8fyjdU1zVUyXoz_QtahMahO7sf5Kk%3D)

The Democrats have already robbed the black community for years. They just want to give us "symbolic gestures" thinking it will satisfy us rather than help with actual problems in the community. They just want our votes with no solutions! Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

We need more doctors in Virginia legislature and we got the guy for you. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=76fc145c69&u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=adecc47afc)

---
| | Team-

This global pandemic has shown us one thing for sure and it's that we need more doctors and medical personnel in office making policy decisions. Our healthcare system and the health of Virginia needs more doctors to direct our public health. That's why we need to elect Dr. Ben Moses in the 59th district.
[TIME TO PUT THE DOCTOR IN THE HOUSE](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=27d5c69a93&e=76fc145c69)

As our neighbors navigate times of tremendous crisis — from a global pandemic to economic recession to racial injustice — Ben is ready to offer clear, steady leadership in the House of Delegates for the health and success of Central Virginians. In Richmond, Ben will be a fierce advocate for all who call the 59th District home.
As a veteran and an ICU doctor down in the Charlottesville area, Ben is used to dealing with patients in crisis. Right now, public health is in crisis and we need someone to come in and give it the necessary help it deserves. We need a healthcare system that serves everyone and a public health system that can protect the most vulnerable. [Can you help Ben get into that position by chipping in $25, $50, $100, or more to our tandem fundraising effort](https://royerforva.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbac8144f4b993e3d966e50bc&id=75ab414078&e=76fc145c69)?
---
| Stay well,
Matt

name: Andrew
subject: re: police turning their backs on Dems...so should Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARBARINO FOR CONGRESS |

Did you catch this powerful photo from the... _Peter_ _—Andrew here._ _Did you catch this powerful photo from the New York Post?_ [](http://links.garbarinoforny.com/u/click?_t=7b77702d6650435d80b420c1495e37a8&_m=fef14e363f6446509368dc2e1d4ca78d&_e=mIHf-sljqu6ce3mRDaczoJgUrCNmus8zih6mhL-ggPxYH4BzAhbZdYtHME6ZF-ZdRHJZMofqyAx6PlIci3nYnhatH2TC688qlsVuSILzH2E-5BS5pEisQ-c43hmhsaooCEv921eG1ipkH8-wyqylAWjtxONsLcpNWBasjV944QvlIM4ktxs3gQLgtgQP-8ZbVlvJNfnITjr7_L6SGGRwjC4kzvAqaeLp0apqyM_TGPJWnWY3jPM4wlVnjOgr64TMFQVZ5LOFtOfITlfPNdTlV93k4YY3AcarxktYCWrJ32_PRD1KmT3iKy4VRZu25kZGuliDsPQDDa4gQYX45pWoCQ6AmG9mQ-fCa52XWCBsL1M7NVMf6nkdsAwOJ5NZZ3aw1sp27rIbIU9Z2gYoOYPEa-4gg8UzCIn843b9b8glONjgbtqKdjCBl_UELEH0ubcXxKX2OQhcziThEU6jY78q989E92Son8qS_RwYkdwYcrxc6KhMLgVabIFc7Ypf8jB5) _It’s the Chicago Police Department turning their backs on Mayor Lori Lightfoot regarding the shooting of a Chicago Police officer. _ _ _ _Democrats like Lori Lightfoot’s anti-police actions and rhetoric have emboldened the criminals in her city and created the conditions that allowed this to happen. _ _ _ _I wish this were a rare situation, but police are resigning in record numbers across the country for the very same reason._ _ _ _Democrats in Washington scoff as we accuse them of trying to Defund the Police, meanwhile their party actively defunds the police in Democrat-controlled cities across the country. _ _ _ _Our police risk so much to defend and serve our communities; name: Marisa Wood
subject: re: Drought
body:
This issue is personal for me. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34439636/301974444/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkwOWQ1OC1iMTAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sRsCnB5hajKqbROA0c_LtDnt0WLmaqWruz51QNWcqOA=)
Did you see this news, friend?

Many Californians, especially in the Central Valley, are dealing with extreme drought.

**_Cal Matters_ is now reporting that 2,700 wells across the state are projected to go dry this year. If the trend continues, another 1,000 will go dry next year.**

We need to be clear -- climate change is real, and it's only getting worse. Unless we take urgent action, we’re going to keep seeing frequent floods, wildfires, hurricanes, storms, and droughts. This isn't the time for half measures.

**This issue is personal for me:** My husband John and I raised our kids on an apple orchard where he worked. We're both familiar with farmers' need for water -- not to mention the importance of clean drinking water for other households. John is still working with farmers in the area, and we've been hearing about this regularly.

Farmers, working families, and our communities bear the brunt of this issue while politicians like Kevin McCarthy refuse to do anything about the climate crisis. Worse still, he'd rather spend his time kowtowing to Trump and the far-right to advance his career.

**We need someone who will take our fight to DC and go to bat for this community -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. That's how I've pledged to run this campaign and why I'm asking you today:**

**[I'm ready to bring my knowledge of agriculture and water issues to Washington DC to fight for this district and solve our climate crisis, but I need to know you’re with me. Add your name to this petition and send a strong message to Congress that California's drought needs immediate attention.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34439637/301974445/-1367621556?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDkwOWQ1OC1iMTAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sRsCnB5hajKqbROA0c_LtDnt0WLmaqWruz51QNWcqOA=&emci=03909d58-b102-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=04909d58-b102-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21170704)**

clean_body: This issue is personal for me. | = Did you see this news, friend? Many Californians, especially in the Central Valley, are dealing with extreme drought. Cal Matters is now reporting that 2,700 wells across the state are projected to go dry this year. If the trend continues, another 1,000 will go dry next year. We need to be clear -- climate change is real, and it's only getting worse. Unless we take urgent action, we’re going to keep seeing frequent floods, wildfires, hurricanes, storms, and droughts. This isn't the time for half measures. This issue is personal for me: My husband John and I raised our kids on an apple orchard where he worked. We're both familiar with farmers' need for water -- not to mention the importance of clean drinking water for other households. John is still working with farmers in the area, and we've been hearing about this regularly. Farmers, working families, and our communities bear the brunt of this issue while politicians like Kevin McCarthy refuse to do anything about the climate crisis. Worse still, he'd rather spend his time kowtowing to Trump and the far-right to advance his career. We need someone who will take our fight to DC and go to bat for this community -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. That's how I've pledged to run this campaign and why I'm asking you today: | Sincerely, Marisa = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. subject: Back to the 1970s? – Update from the Mississippi Center for Public Policy
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/backtothe70s?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=f40d277672&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=b8191658c5&e=5703353baa)
---
| | [](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=ec90a4e849&e=5703353baa)
---
| Dear Friend,
Jimmy Carter’s presidency is starting not to look so bad after all.

Just like in the late 70s, an American President has been left looking ridiculously weak abroad. As happened a generation ago, Communist dictators have been emboldened.

At home, energy costs and inflation are rising. A sense of division hangs over America.
---
|
---
| Watch what our own Aaron Rice had to say about the situation in Afghanistan [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=eb53cde59b&e=5703353baa) and read his latest op-ed in the [Clarion Ledger](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d4ffd1f8a8&e=5703353baa).

America was able to recover in the early 1980s. The Communists were confronted. The economy recovered, and the American Republic renewed.

But that did not happen by accident. It happened because Ronald Reagan and others recognized the problem – and then provided America with the right policies and leadership.

At the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, we are committed to putting America back on the right track. We believe that free markets, limited government, and individual liberty are the engine of America’s success.

America can and will recover from these setbacks. But it will only happen because we stay true to America’s Founding Ideals.

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4f81f11a13&e=5703353baa "A Veteran's Take on the Afghanistan Pullout")
---
| Aaron Rice discusses his thoughts as a Veteran on the Biden-Harris Admin's failures in leaving Afghanistan and to remind other Veterans that may be having a hard time right now to reach out to their battle buddies.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2854bf1387&e=5703353baa)
---
| On this week's Free Mississippi, Douglas talks with Zuby, a British rapper and Oxford graduate, about his impressions of America and why it is still the freest country on earth.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=32415001ac&e=5703353baa)
---

Peter—Jeff here.

You know President Trump once said, “without borders, we don’t have a country,” and he was exactly right.

The Biden administration has turned our entire country into a ‘sanctuary city’ in just _**SIX MONTHS!**_

Let’s be clear, they don’t care who is coming into our country, which is why they failed to:
* **Test effectively for COVID-19**
* **Deport illegal immigrants with known criminal records**
* **Secure the southern border**

Democrats have manufactured a crisis at the southern border and now are planning to grant amnesty and a pathway to citizenship to 22 MILLION illegal immigrants!

That’s why we’re seeing the _New York Times_ calling to allow illegal immigrants the right to vote in our elections!

Fortunately, Democrats don’t have quite the majority they need in the Senate to push through this radical amnesty plan. _**But they could soon!**_

**If I don’t win this fight in Pennsylvania, Democrats will have the power they need to radically and irreparably destroy America as we know it!**

_[**Peter, will you RUSH $5, $10, or even $25 to ensure that Democrats don’t consolidate their power in 2022?**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0d89976831b44d58be17a6b62e427f37&_e=rZGuse1n1LIOSE8nqXBS2UoMVLyN7A9ep8LTIC7UTwxNRyKuY4vByv_ZhC6_RJfdqL-mTiCDyMAQJJmGUnJbPUW8a_sp6BVZ0RKulDdygeB6plK_9Q0Kz4NmCoKU5UhtoyxxIFNm8Hq9iJIcjdBkEI-X9Xo5yjnYk9plPt-TYrHCQzIHiTcoEh488yCPQWK108buKb-IZXQCbY3i1Ef4Msxvy8Y6lPC2ivW8-Qsc29Dy3giXRvsO2X0ZeZsQwrmo_oHNHbl-fuqmx2Vk-MUQNUxughC5lWs7KbJeDeSinB-ivSkucaTQZeAZeVp87DoOPr3YkumilpM_eKiOvwH2uzoX8NZOCy4r6HgqV9rzQYNnJKesvXDK1E84LcMGHP9R__3GD0jk509bBrsqKhhY9Vxb2C5vQypCk9gYNxxCxVKFgZLbYBtxaNfEuliZhHP3rhuiSHlsPtej0OiB_39UKetHGpYMUQCYhVqcydZYGLUEGR7gppXXXFjSU8pvu4gT)_

Hey Peter,

I don’t know if you’ve heard yet, but the $1.2 Trillion infrastructure bill recently passed through the Senate. While it contains many awful provisions, _nothing is worse than what they have planned after:_ **The U.S. Citizenship Act of 2021**.

By passing this recent infrastructure bill, they have opened the floodgates for mass amnesty legislation to be passed via reconciliation.

**According to the Heritage Foundation, this bill would:**

_“grant amnesty to virtually every illegal alien in the country, estimates of which range from 11 million to 22 million...___erase the line between illegal and legal immigration.___”_

This was Joe Biden and the Democrats’ plan all along: **encourage mass illegal migration through our southern borders and create an entirely new voting block for the Democratic party. **

That’s why we need fearless conservative fighters like Jeff Bartos who won’t roll over to Democrat demands.

**_[Rush anything you can to help Jeff secure this seat in the Senate so he can SECURE OUR BORDERS >>](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0d89976831b44d58be17a6b62e427f37&_e=rZGuse1n1LIOSE8nqXBS2UoMVLyN7A9ep8LTIC7UTwxNRyKuY4vByv_ZhC6_RJfdqL-mTiCDyMAQJJmGUnJbPUW8a_sp6BVZ0RKulDdygeB6plK_9Q0Kz4NmCoKU5UhtoyxxIFNm8Hq9iJIcjdBkEI-X9Xo5yjnYk9plPt-TYrHCQzIHiTcoEh488yCPQWK108buKb-IZXQCbY3i1Ef4Msxvy8Y6lPC2ivW8-Qsc29Dy3giXRvsO2X0ZeZsQwrmo_oHNHbl-fuqmx2Vk-MUQNe205qFvUw-zBc5iaKIRP59DeZ9e29b0wqktr_OdUk7gfUka_3YhUdSFkcHHqL2tATgo9czIoerEt_m7kk9Z1vU7Ty8qHYweZWtSudMl6m1UnUvoGlydXaIFZDh9HU16uLeyPI-37gJI1e8TBNax7A05S39BeDPw4vSC2ZEbyKzXEOVDTYDqNj05WlJKKSXMv1aIKzjRo8tVyre59HhDrracLj6H-uwi6gyJf6kxfA-n)_**
[**Defeat Democrats’ Amnesty Agenda**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=0d89976831b44d58be17a6b62e427f37&_e=rZGuse1n1LIOSE8nqXBS2UoMVLyN7A9ep8LTIC7UTwxNRyKuY4vByv_ZhC6_RJfdqL-mTiCDyMAQJJmGUnJbPUW8a_sp6BVZ0RKulDdygeB6plK_9Q0Kz4NmCoKU5UhtoyxxIFNm8Hq9iJIcjdBkEI-X9Xo5yjnYk9plPt-TYrHCQzIHiTcoEh488yCPQWK108buKb-IZXQCbY3i1Ef4Msxvy8Y6lPC2ivW8-Qsc29Dy3giXRvsO2X0ZeZsQwrmo_oHNHbl-fuqmx2Vk-MUQNfkUKo594p0WEvtoVYIg5ZACgOauiaf595GB8P95O7ZsrqlzQRUFhjsniXNUBckY5UY7ISZt8PyxT_-X6Nx3KeJOsJ3WrAR-PE5WokUEuL1rGKuhdm6Q4XeD2NhEJcZjEXJerh4eWQe0FNaJIvwGWZwEjXEPP_CkqEONvfCzRAuS9H-uC-5_JJcO7kXXxn-vPM_7YksM3r54LuawOM-mtGo6ruzc5wh-kBV1xEK6tUw4)

clean_body: This was Joe Biden and the Democrats’ plan all along... | | Peter—Jeff here. You know President Trump once said, “without borders, we don’t have a country,” and he was exactly right. The Biden administration has turned our entire country into a ‘sanctuary city’ in just SIX MONTHS! Let’s be clear, they don’t care who is coming into our country, which is why they failed to: Test effectively for COVID-19 Deport illegal immigrants with known criminal records Secure the southern border Democrats have manufactured a crisis at the southern border and now are planning to grant amnesty and a pathway to citizenship to 22 MILLION illegal immigrants! That’s why we’re seeing the New York Times calling to allow illegal immigrants the right to vote in our elections! Fortunately, Democrats don’t have quite the majority they need in the Senate to push through this radical amnesty plan. But they could soon! If I don’t win this fight in Pennsylvania, Democrats will have the power they need to radically and irreparably destroy America as we know it! Thanks, Jeff Bartos \---------- forwarded message below ---------- From: Border Alert (Team Bartos) Date: Fri. Aug. 20th, 2021, at 10:12 AM Subject: apparently, amnesty is also infrastructure To: | Hey Peter, I don’t know if you’ve heard yet, but the $1.2 Trillion infrastructure bill recently passed through the Senate. While it contains many awful provisions, nothing is worse than what they have planned after: The U.S. Citizenship Act of 2021. By passing this recent infrastructure bill, they have opened the floodgates for mass amnesty legislation to be passed via reconciliation. According to the Heritage Foundation, this bill would: “grant amnesty to virtually every illegal alien in the country, estimates of which range from 11 million to 22 million...erase the line between illegal and legal immigration.” This was Joe Biden and the Democrats’ plan all along: encourage mass illegal migration through our southern borders and create an entirely new voting block for the Democratic party. That’s why we need fearless conservative fighters like Jeff Bartos who won’t roll over to Democrat demands. Peter, Democrats have left our borders open and our country vulnerable for their own political gain They have sold out our country, freedoms, and communities andthen expect us to pay for all of it! - ** Thank you, Team Bartos | | | Paid for by Bartos for US Senate | | 1152 Mae Street #129, Hummelstown, PA, 17036 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Peter, we wanted to check in with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
Affordable housing, paid leave, universal child care, a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers, climate action, lowering prescription drug prices and expanding access to care: **These are just a**** _few_****of the issues that were top of mind for voters when they delivered Democrats the White House, the Senate, and the House.**
Pramila is working hard to deliver on this agenda by quickly passing a bold jobs and families package that makes transformative investments in working people. But some of her colleagues are threatening to block these and other popular, necessary, and urgent Democratic priorities.
So Peter, we wanted to check in with you: [**Do you agree we need to act fast on a spending bill that finally puts us and our communities first? Take our quick survey to let Pramila know exactly how you feel as she continues this important work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/spending-priorities-survey/?source=em-20210821&t=1&akid=562%2E420207%2Ex-GIrh)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/spending-priorities-survey/?source=em-20210821&t=2&akid=562%2E420207%2Ex-GIrh)**
Democrats need to be the party that delivers for the people, period. Thanks for making your voice heard on this!
—Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210821-562-footer&t=3&refcode2=562_420207_x-GIrh&akid=562%2E420207%2Ex-GIrh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=4&akid=562%2E420207%2Ex-GIrh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=562%2E420207%2Ex-GIrh)

The voting hasn’t even begun, but they’re certain they’re going to win thanks to their plan to End Voter ID, Legalize Ballot Harvesting, and Seize Taxpayer Funds for their campaigns. Right now, the stakes in our politics could not be any higher. Joe Biden’s disastrous Afghanistan surrender has shown what’s at stake in foreign policy, and the Democrats’ socialist agenda is a clear and present danger to our nation’s future. | | The Democrats are already raising mountains of money to attack and defeat our Republican candidates, Peter. They’re prepared to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to hold on to power, and we have to be ready to stop them whatever the cost. We need to focus our efforts 100% on winning back the House and the Senate so we can stop the Left’s agenda in its tracks. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

**A Disastrous Ending To A Disastrous War 👎**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rF4hyHt8VyJZHcRluEwiJ1J_NrP8o0XvAPHhq4AIQRYrisqeJDZFvcNcGooSxW3_0Ko37AJ90RG0gIXiTLoOVfoTq8fQoI1rfRNtKNJSewFuMYBOXPnPIS-N8TRhoA3KvPxSfrrX20ulBrzsCvYVv64PNDzA7qE9ApSZiYlLWSYPJklLvcIOVt6IIYA2K6N54anRxDmlUzIC_u7ulX99fnzc-u3Ioffwlclj3emtoM3qGY13FT2y9GBHkLHTDEekU8dsBLiKkldUMLVi9KCWhspMiLksOgxYBpTUtBjjG8rNQqI1qljdBGdVCOiOpfbdfo9XBW-6sZGdVjNXK2ORcL0kKtAzRE01uofNtfsCpnbmy0ndjUGbvNvLySGVVI9yOQ%3D%3D)
Here are some harsh numbers to consider:

→ $2 trillion
→ more than 2,000 lives
→ 2 decades

That is the cost of the war in Afghanistan. It’s true, the United States should have been out of Afghanistan years ago. But HOW we leave matters. It matters a great deal. When we entered Afghanistan we had a clear goal: to bring Osama Bin-Laden to justice. Ten years ago, we accomplished that goal. That would have been the perfect opportunity to declare victory and leave.

Instead of declaring victory, America’s hasty exit looks more like capitulation. In the process, we abandoned our own citizens, [armed](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rJafsawuPOj2lf8yyuJHqux6EATX6Zn9Ycbf_hNrzYyzKQjvO5089GurTPVllQsQfNAeSGqzdiClnDogaxuxhNh_HfVLhg7MTHAY3uwYcFHoHH_gEQ_Gjcc1N1jCQRPVjvAA4L6yWHwJi3Zwaw8QX-fKQS14ZPPJilJOnItw9vrh8tc8BXxnpNCXXNkdcX7UdaG72WF2ktKrOsj2j-VVZ76a-qCs9ODL_JCjrgnPlhT5yqEjLdvwNnSAYpZNdSaGHXaFyAUpE-qOjRL_nXX_-dkT7YLfe6BNTB8EVrBGqAtIM3yE6nVPApCKGzVPuZqf_EfIRChV5tyEwfl4xnBQXew81Ewoiv4kmf4RHbV-2nVoNiHaKzNR_dyDVf0VIpSO5DEbyXuRn72sCP5RGYRPCI6qta-tMlVcAQgAD6NxdSqE3LoQrIlb7fWjz8kjSX0eS1dYW-LUFWGXmdo2ofKI-cMkBAx9zKALoGkOqIUUlVXS) the Taliban, [emboldened](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rKtoct7EPgtCAuLEsmwHgPVSVXYroSoJvsuzIIopf1ipEjznY4IAuxH6sr0AWRKs4g3eNwXr6a5HI1_73rO2E7ONIpVqUI9vooh-8XFJLbP3mAim9-xXL_dRnpBuoaAFgXHOvGrFzc1bn25pdj5PibtFPX6k1Bb_IBagwigS6rLvrx-PHNWTCJZIx73Ofw2UxZPS8ZW63Q58crL0P8fU8qb_ZTT_DCV1Ygrax0bpJ7PLBGF_kx0eZUcIZScPf0jlIUgGI5ZwDhLa1_7J1Kt2B0udwePcHjyCGBJFNzs1Ck_IEbTeWYfIwX1H4OgCxjFlGMdBFImh2YRTMolnFik73522x5_bfkdbc97dx0G5Ae0G) our enemies, [infuriated](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rH9N5zoQEICF6KfRoDOMG5VdhE5SwMIjgVJdAWacuxxQppjO971mr3rDrcMNL_T5BKKH3RzTfmORiYASNrian9O5slSooRaW45MpKJJvYrcENU_8FYqA4ihI7E4TAY1ujcTiPZNfMh0KQ6GTVvYQnMT1ea-Jkbs3g-ESBH44cHr1cFkdbaD4QM-jiifmnAQ2y4Tb01r5bjJfHmBjCsfrLyL2peJwptiA36OATTtv9YvN8XI677pJHkE48ArI_oViPqMyqjmX1-TTAse7P63DNrG0raDLn2HhRCXS99dofp0Bkbx3EWVzvdNghJuiYaSEgf5RyDVUSbwdrMEOncOiy1k%3D) our allies, and broadcasted American weakness.

In our darkest hour, America needs a leader. Where was our leader? [Hiding](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rM6VQG3JfeK2Kp-97qqeWg-IzPA5Bc_IS2ahs6lEia4SuAaa_m1wt951vKk3is3C0vtsc5_ytlf97XaIkCGjI5Z1vCY1Uw9J3du5n8DX59fLUU_N2xt_b8ybMl6opC9tx0K1GiGCuLJI0ScLJBd-z_pHS6Utd0nqXobUdRCipmbGiJR236vK4opBnmR0Cgm6919BUr-kVQSxl-jF9QWfP8TPbXWlwSjoiocvrA2FNSx-_EvqjVhSJGoXIRo9sjpiXKZaBFl3F7kVoqhmGYVSr5mmAq-Jbxy-va7NpoFwDjLoxB2oSr7j_8u5N_VsZhIucg%3D%3D) and ducking questions Americans deserve answers for. I am praying for the people of Afghanistan, our citizens, and our country.

**These Tennesseans Live Up To The Volunteer State Name 👏**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=93d26e8000124328961f207a72a0e377&_e=LZ0-TC4DWywAhJ_cCnl2rF4hyHt8VyJZHcRluEwiJ1LmUNSi9INLCuauafTANDAHBuIzBxPtWmterueku25nJmNjdcWYVr7iTR_SmMFKYlkdAJXiOGgt70HpEahHQKuIpGt5REZBbNbJ5K-LXutvWUtbC9KY4wcq5XSZ4FobFfUN_PcRWt7spyDHDxWEZZvGRGY-uA4fbBZQLoMSlKXJiIoYnfWfOqxFACsbqZZZq20drCmQJbYteLUk1zHR2SypR-miHuv27peV0vG2IXYYABgxh9GO6cjjV19QVPxvXs9D7Dyy4hPaTTBTfJW9iiSmsMkeZ8ZAJ6LuKgoT0HDxz0ZU9Ad1-ob8lRWL8MygpU6PzqAFRf3eYMiQWCVI2Z1_)
A volunteer ministry group is living up to the “Volunteer State” name. This week, the ministers broke ground on a new housing development that will be home to 48 new apartments for the homeless population and will provide services to prevent homelessness. We applaud them for their service to our community.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country. | | A Disastrous Ending To A Disastrous War 👎 Here are some harsh numbers to consider: → $2 trillion → more than 2,000 lives → 2 decades That is the cost of the war in Afghanistan. It’s true, the United States should have been out of Afghanistan years ago. But HOW we leave matters. It matters a great deal. When we entered Afghanistan we had a clear goal: to bring Osama Bin-Laden to justice. Ten years ago, we accomplished that goal. That would have been the perfect opportunity to declare victory and leave. Instead of declaring victory, America’s hasty exit looks more like capitulation. In the process, we abandoned our own citizens, the Taliban, our enemies, our allies, and broadcasted American weakness. In our darkest hour, America needs a leader. Where was our leader? and ducking questions Americans deserve answers for. I am praying for the people of Afghanistan, our citizens, and our country. → Read more: East Tennessee lawmakers react to fall of Kabul in Afghanistan after US troops withdrawal () → Read more: Amid Afghan crisis, Biden is hiding, fibbing or confusing Americans — who need a leader () | These Tennesseans Live Up To The Volunteer State Name 👏 A volunteer ministry group is living up to the “Volunteer State” name. This week, the ministers broke ground on a new housing development that will be home to 48 new apartments for the homeless population and will provide services to prevent homelessness. We applaud them for their service to our community. | Just For Fun 🎉 → An amazing act of kindness from these officers 🚓 () → This young man embraces the great outdoors for a great cause ⛺️ () → This bride made it to the church on time in a bizarre fashion 👰 () | Our campaign to take back the House in 2022 is already in the works. I know I can win this race and give our community the representation it deserves.

But he has over $420,000 lined up to stop me, so I can’t do this alone.

Friend,

At first, I thought this was an intelligence failure.

In recent days, however, it’s become clear that Biden and his team only view foreign policy through politics and polling — not what’s in the best interest of America.

And now, Americans are stuck behind Taliban lines and Joe Biden is letting the Taliban push him around.

It needs to stop, and our focus now should be on getting every American citizen out of Afghanistan.

Thank you for standing with us.

Friend,
The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change (IPCC) Report is a wake-up call: **Congress must take bold climate action now. **
The world's top scientists are telling Members of Congress and policy makers around the globe that we cannot wait any longer.
We're already feeling the consequences of climate change with extreme temperatures, drought, and devastating wildfires. But we can still prevent even worse damage.
The stakes of this crisis demand nothing less than the most ambitious plan for clean energy and resilient infrastructure in American history.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34442766/301987541/72349127?refcode=jqq_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2I5N2JiNi1jMDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTm6c3FKQMZjotH__appAkNH3AQRuuDFaXDyTyy4wAA=)

| | Team — When I first decided to run for Congress, I did so with the intention of preserving Democracy and protecting the will of the American people. That means listening to the hard-working members of our community and putting your needs first. If we’re going to defeat Mike Garcia and flip California’s 25th District, I’m going to need your input every step of the way. **[That’s why I’m asking you to take just one moment to fill out our priorities survey and tell me what’s most important to you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34442768/301987542/-192731588?contactdata=eYcNzqJAlxqfBrZL3Ip7v7QukwBR6hINq6yokokYXW9UML5gBF6HTCknqbIhSUyf9xJsVwpId1oDFKmrn6ojvraMxsSHoPFZJK9HaZPGQSZ6N%2FaiB9bzvuxQYQoyAvlvRjSB2dFdbDKiqkuKFVhksQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2I5N2JiNi1jMDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTm6c3FKQMZjotH__appAkNH3AQRuuDFaXDyTyy4wAA=&emci=e913dc01-c201-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=47b97bb6-c002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14505483) I want to know which issues you think are worth fighting for and how I can best represent our district moving forward.** | | | [Begin Survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34442769/301987545/-192731588?contactdata=eYcNzqJAlxqfBrZL3Ip7v7QukwBR6hINq6yokokYXW9UML5gBF6HTCknqbIhSUyf9xJsVwpId1oDFKmrn6ojvraMxsSHoPFZJK9HaZPGQSZ6N%2FaiB9bzvuxQYQoyAvlvRjSB2dFdbDKiqkuKFVhksQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2I5N2JiNi1jMDAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iTm6c3FKQMZjotH__appAkNH3AQRuuDFaXDyTyy4wAA=&emci=e913dc01-c201-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=47b97bb6-c002-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=14505483)
---
Mike Garcia has always been more concerned with satisfying the far-right base of Donald Trump’s Republican Party than actually serving the constituents of California’s 25th District.

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Stop the Insanity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Our schools have been converted into indoctrination centers. Here's proof. Laura Morris has been a public-school teacher for 10 years. She has always loved her students and been a dedicated mentor and educator to them. Recently, the Super Intendent for her school district demanded that she spread his radical propaganda... Like Critical Race Theory (CRT). **The Superintendent even asked her colleagues to turn her in if she privately disagreed with his CRT agenda.** That's why earlier this month, after dedicating her entire life to her students, Mrs. Morris tearfully resigned in front of the school board: "I quit your policies, I quit your training, and I quit being a cog in a machine that tells me to push highly politicized agendas to our most vulnerable constituents - children." [**The 1776 Project PAC is an organization dedicated to shutting down CRT, and kicking these radical leftists of our local school boards. Will you send in $35 dollars today to remove and replace radical school board members?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) Because Mrs. Morris's story isn't the only one that has come out of public schools in the last couple of weeks... Kila Mosey, a black mother from Atlanta, GA, discovered that the principal of her school had separated kids into "white classes" and "black classes." But friend, it gets worse... Nicole Solas, a Rhode Island mom, demanded that her school district disclosed whether they were forcing CRT on students. When she kept demanding answers, the Teacher's Union SUED HER to intimidate her. They're shameless. They don't think we have a right to decide what our kids are being taught, and they'll do anything to stop you from having a say. [**This insanity will never end unless we stand up. Every day we don 't act we lose another member of the next generation. We simply cannot afford to wait. Will you send in your $35 donation to shut down these radical leftists and stop CRT TODAY?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) But let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I'm the founder of the 1776 Project PAC. My vision for this organization is to send the radical left packing and fill our nation's school boards with America-loving patriots. Already, concerned citizens just like you have contributed thousands to shut down CRT by removing and replacing left wing extremists. [**But if we are going to be successful on a national scale, we need your help today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) You see, when you contribute to 1776 Project PAC, your dollar does more to impact the future of our country than it could anywhere else. Each school board race that we're targeting will cost between $10,000-$20,000 to win. That's pennies on the dollar compared to the average Congressional race. And what's worse is that most politicians in D.C. do nothing but grandstand without ever achieving anything for their constituents. **Every dollar that the 1776 Project PAC receives is a highly effective investment into the future of our country because we fund the races of people who have a direct say over what students are learning in YOUR hometown.****** By removing and replacing anti-American leftists from school board you're ensuring we don't raise a generation that **hates America and hates one another based on the color of their skin.** [**Will you chip in $35 today to help us save our kids, and our nation 's future from CRT?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) Thank you in advance, P.S. I grew up in a country that taught me to love others, regardless of the color of their skin, their religion, or their political views. But our nation's kids are being taught something entirely different. They're being taught that all white people are racist, and that all black people are victims. I'm not just heartbroken at what the left is doing. I'm infuriated by it. [**Will you rush in $35 today to help the 1776 Project PAC end the insanity by firing from CRT radicals from local schoolboards?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168973:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168974:JmyKB0lmN:m:1:3253819041:075269AA1FA27BA125491AACE233C67B:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Walt Blackman | AZ Patriot
subject: border crossings at 21-year-high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
body:
I’m a combat veteran, a constitutional patriot, and a conservative fighter and I’m bringing this insane headline from Breitbart to every conservative patriot. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c398%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=MdZl7tNvI7McOlXmbfQrjw&sysid=1)
| |
---

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r6Bmtzl6IaA2vtF5ILlnWg&sysid=1)

|
---
Hi friend ー I’m Walt Blackman.

I’m a combat veteran, a constitutional patriot, and a conservative fighter and I’m bringing this insane headline from _Breitbart_ to every conservative patriot.

⬇⬇⬇

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65014%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b13dcJ3ayjjCGLcG7ap6Tg&sysid=1)

**From July 2020 to July 2021, we’ve seen a****420% INCREASE****of migrant apprehensions at our southern border to put that in perspective that is****200,000 MORE****and a****21-YEAR-HIGH!**

Friend, this isn’t even a border crisis anymore. It’s a full-blown assault on the sovereignty of the United States caused by Joe Biden and the Democrats.

Now, they’re trying to sneak mass amnesty and citizenship through Congress for everyone coming over our borders illegally, regardless of _**criminal record**_ or _**asylum status**._

It’s clear what must happen. We must continue building the wall and securing our bordersー**[friend, will you rush a few dollars to help me to continue President Trump’s mission to Build the Wall?](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65025%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zFgdDlPrJQau7KL9DK%2bBPQ&sysid=1)**
[**Build the Wall**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AYktOwSz0yBQTkefBkK5A&sysid=1)
Friend, I’m fighting to end Biden’s Border Crisis and secure our borders, but I can’t do that without the support and opinions from supporters like you!

**[Friend, support my fight to build the rest of the wall BRICK BY BRICK by rushing few dollars right now >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65027%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YNmj2581y5i6tjYFWc7IcA&sysid=1)**
[**Build the Wall**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AYktOwSz0yBQTkefBkK5A&sysid=1)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r6Bmtzl6IaA2vtF5ILlnWg&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r6Bmtzl6IaA2vtF5ILlnWg&sysid=1)

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world’s most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.
My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don’t believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don’t believe in burning our flag...**

**We stand up for our flag! **

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65013%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=r6Bmtzl6IaA2vtF5ILlnWg&sysid=1)

I’m running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I’ve served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link: [https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2753716](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65028%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8Eqpq6AYxUuXfn0d33CrnA&sysid=1) __**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman
[**Build the Wall**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65026%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1AYktOwSz0yBQTkefBkK5A&sysid=1)
---
Pictures taken in uniform while Walt was in active service does not imply DOD or military endorsement.
---
| |
---
| Paid for by Walt Blackman for Congress |
| |
| |
| |
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c398%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=MdZl7tNvI7McOlXmbfQrjw&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c398%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=MdZl7tNvI7McOlXmbfQrjw&sysid=1)

---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Nothing to Lose](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopo_Q6eg1pfC-64TZdea3mcrUv2jYKJjL9HTvd9WYkS5w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=1) Thanks to all for the kind feedback on Thursday’s debate, which was broadcast to 22 million Californians. I was grateful to be named the winner by 81 percent of viewers in the network’s post-debate poll. You can watch the debate [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqPA_n9wiNlKMIFI8cjrZiVr6CHF8MhWnW8mTID0SdpMlN4apFUtef9RrBYlfX-a0A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=2). And the group Freelancers for Kiley has some fantastic new memes you can share [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioo7HcFko45W9sZ3UDyBtDXE3Ha10FHiTJZKki_v3og_wA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=3). Yesterday I visited an amazing charter school where students were happy and learning. The school has stayed open, made masks optional, and offered a flourishing independent study option. It was a reminder of what’s at stake in the Recall. Newsom wants charters gone, wants masks worn indefinitely, and is threatening another shutdown. He also continues to play politics with the vaccine, announcing passports will be required for large events. And now he’s called upon Kamala Harris and Joe Biden to rescue him. They'll have to explain why we deserve America's worst governor and a state government that's outperformed by all 49 others. Yes, California leads the nation in all the wrong ways. That’s why people of all parties are voting YES. There’s nothing to lose. [Help our campaign get its message out for the home stretch](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=4) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lRRCK90LByd_IZ7SYQ32hXdGYSh_QNx24op8gCjcFPsRBdD_8OFMVw-LIYJSa42Tf-bFe5erNWh9kjCVlaGieh1G2nOsZlP7seV7udWeDeHM3mVyQI5Pm3F6LjYHetQYw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=5) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=aug21_final&n=6)

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I have the endorsement of the Washington State Republican Party
body:
What an honor!
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| A little over four months ago we launched our campaign for the United States Senate. I knew I had the love and support of my family, who are standing with me today. They have been my rock as we've traveled from Seattle to Spokane, and everywhere in between.
---
|
---
| I am honored to receive the endorsement of the Washington State Republican Party. For three long decades, Patty Murray has focused on the out of touch agenda of Washington, DC Democrats rather than the unique needs of her constituents all across Washington State.
I'm running for the U.S. Senate to be Washington State's voice in Washington, DC and it will take the hard work of every Republican, open-minded Independent, and discerning Democrat to defeat a career politician like Patty Murray. I am grateful for the Washington State Republican Party's support and confidence, and I am excited to take our positive message for Washington's future to communities all across our great state.
We cannot rest on the success of the opening weeks of our campaign. We understand that this is a fight, a fight for the soul of our state, and it's a fight we must win. I know you are as committed to winning this fight as I am. Join me, and next November, with your continued support, we will send a shockwave from right here in Washington State all the way to Washington, DC.
Thank you,
Tiffany
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | Smiley for Washington, Inc. | P.O. BOX 1058, Richland, WA 99352
---

_That’s a lot to go up against._ **Which means our path to victory is going to depend on the small dollar contributions of grassroots supporters like you.**
Steve isn’t relying on dark money or GOP Super Pacs like his opponents, and your support is ESSENTIAL for us to keep up with our boots-on-the-ground organizing efforts.

As Virginia’s next Governor, I want to create great paying jobs, reduce health care costs, and build the best education system in the country. That’s my mission. That’s why I’m running.

My opponent, Glenn Youngkin? He says he’s running for Donald Trump. Trump knows this -- that’s why he gave Glenn his “complete and total endorsement.”

It’s no mystery why Trump endorsed Glenn. Trump’s lies and conspiracy theories that Joe Biden and Democrats stole the election are a central part of Youngkin’s campaign.

Youngkin wants to ban abortion and put more guns on our streets. He even brags about vacationing with Ted Cruz and says he opposes Medicaid expansion in Virginia.

So this is no joke, Derek. Glenn Youngkin is a billionaire extremist. If he buys the Governor’s office, he’ll roll back all of Virginia’s hard won progress. A Youngkin win in 2021’s most important race would tighten Donald Trump’s grip over the Republican Party. Extremists on the far-right all over our country would be emboldened.

So it’s critical for Democrats to come together and stop them. And the best way to do that is by building the biggest small dollar fundraising operation in the history of Virginia politics.

**I need you, Derek.[Will you support our team by donating anything you can afford right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34445706/301995198/-2023814932?refcode=20210821.5_TM_8CS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTFkN2E2MS1jZjAyLWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMp-VuYnqcRUAjE3RXbLcZ58xctwpiA118l0F4NarWI=)**

Game on!

Terry

name: Darryn Harris, Team Bass
subject: Fwd: Did you see this? Ethics watchdogs are blowing the whistle on Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Hello --

Karen wanted to make sure I passed on this note from the team. Postmaster Louis DeJoy is unfit to serve the American people, and she is demanding his replacement without delay. If we're going to protect the United States Postal Service, postal workers, and the millions of Americans who rely on this essential service, DeJoy has to go.

**[We are working to gather at least 500 more signatures before midnight tonight, calling for the replacement of Louis DeJoy. Will you add your name to our petition?](https://act.myngp.com/el/qOpaPoO4K1e1Nk0wFDe0EpNVl-0VsUAI2NBBqnk2Rb4=/3IaV-cxy9imEh_VtAWfRwuZLty4m2waNvfSoOKmW3Z8=?gpsid=39_132_20217&ms=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&refcode=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Bass <info@karenbass.com>
Date: Thu, Aug 19, 2021
Subject: Louis DeJoy is unfit to serve **FIRST:** Postmaster General Louis DeJoy deliberately slowed down mail delivery times.

**THEN:** The FBI put DeJoy under a federal criminal investigation for alleged campaign finance abuses.

**NOW:** The United States Postal Service (USPS) has announced it will pay $120 million over the next five years **to a company DeJoy has financial ties to.**

Team, people are relying on the USPS more than ever before to deliver disaster relief, life-saving prescriptions, important documents, packages, and more. But DeJoy has proven time and again that he is too corrupt to be leading any federal agency -- especially an agency as essential as the USPS.

**[Last year, Karen Bass called on the Postal Service's board of governors to immediately remove Postmaster General Louis DeJoy. Now, we need to keep the pressure on to save the USPS. Add your name next to Karen's if you agree it is past time to replace Louis DeJoy »](https://act.myngp.com/el/qOpaPoO4K1e1Nk0wFDe0EpNVl-0VsUAI2NBBqnk2Rb4=/3IaV-cxy9imEh_VtAWfRwuZLty4m2waNvfSoOKmW3Z8=?gpsid=39_132_20217&ms=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&refcode=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210821_usps_adv_gq_act_kkr_dh_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Team Bass

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.

clean_body: Hello -- Karen wanted to make sure I passed on this note from the team. Postmaster Louis DeJoy is unfit to serve the American people, and she is demanding his replacement without delay. If we're going to protect the United States Postal Service, postal workers, and the millions of Americans who rely on this essential service, DeJoy has to go. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bass <info@karenbass.com> Date: Thu, Aug 19, 2021 Subject: Louis DeJoy is unfit to serve FIRST: Postmaster General Louis DeJoy deliberately slowed down mail delivery times. THEN: The FBI put DeJoy under a federal criminal investigation for alleged campaign finance abuses. NOW: The United States Postal Service (USPS) has announced it will pay $120 million over the next five years to a company DeJoy has financial ties to. Team, people are relying on the USPS more than ever before to deliver disaster relief, life-saving prescriptions, important documents, packages, and more. But DeJoy has proven time and again that he is too corrupt to be leading any federal agency -- especially an agency as essential as the USPS. In solidarity, Team Bass Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today. Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress Bass for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 United States We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

body:

It starts right here in New Hampshire ... and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."** | [**FIGHT BACK »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWpVfpyixBDEcHsnXqh4DPl7pvwbBbaKnUmGZMm58qSfkHVhQtNNIW2W8Rv_ImmJJ6Bcq8qIosZe1xNBOC7b7nx_FBudbNhrSIgGtJv04qkBslu_4nTB8Kjx98cmbM_gGj5fbJDPFD31D7jksPhixl9xg374t0rpSusYVorQ0f6C3nSJDKK_yDXVhtzMmV7WIckH9_1KYHw10FpeqSld18hEtzdW9SnrPg1TCPC44pRsqS8V_oVZH9S_yyS8xInD10SI1xx_bgMLrqjkoBhqwUczmXfL8qwwpz0xTHN5UFZkLk2Jdl2KMQK-qqdkoW1UoRg/3en/ti1TNclrQD-_UM9ZK6M0Xg/h1/FooVWM7zOtwniJR1M17gT1FBbTpbKBk10KOCs7DjAJg)

Derek,

Mike Pence was in New Hampshire recently for a massive GOP fundraiser, and this quote has stayed with me.

Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority, and Pence made clear that New Hampshire is their top priority. My last race was the closest in the country so my team is laser-focused on keeping our fundraising numbers up. And right now, we’re falling short of our goal.

**[Having Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race is really bad news. Will you please split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA to help make up ground?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGFL7wQvJlY0GjVnSFZeNWpVfpyixBDEcHsnXqh4DPl6LC0OYrrA5EV1DxRBbsjiHQjUaE1VciBQwGj5J-9zlfy2xTzKAkCWgesNGlT5UtZak2TGvyt6Lwneve3_DOmkpb9hBep6AB-WV3nBgrJfogFF8q_FG4JH-FShlcDM-KfhMjdGMBviqiqQ7FBWsLZzAf-46PWHYFvvs7ScnpAViYlPHXHuvt0IDB3arU9Qmsye--Tx_BVkPr6Ddmc_7QCln61lZdm8_PAcTdsv24DhpJMf-FYPRAoLQ7r9BEVmzFzfWgkuOPkQfLI6NB_qM56JZtVgQf6UjqB0lI3Miccqh8g/3en/ti1TNclrQD-_UM9ZK6M0Xg/h2/YvtGg-bg6OLU0u6ZMPR7tf2OEl_X8Zon1rddEh45nKk)**

Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re pulling out all of the stops this time around.

We need people like you to give $25 or what you can right now -- before our deadline -- to show our strength.

Your support is truly important to me, and I’m counting on your help. **[Will you please split $25 between Common Good VA and me right now to protect our fragile Democratic Senate majority?
