name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58168826:623cx0lN7:m:1:3253819041:3DFDC15887027CE9924D30ECAB75E512:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
---

He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump! He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission. He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington. Here's MY reaction to THAT: Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv. His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing? After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood. This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place. That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it. Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat. Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. He 's working for them, after all. And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare: I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants I'll fight for the America First agenda I'm ACTUALLY a Republican! That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022. If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight. Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation. Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter. As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need TERM LIMITS in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda. As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame. I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together. Thank you, Catalina Lauf | | | Paid for by Catalina for Congress | | | | | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: Risking it All | True the Vote Weekly Update
body:
Election Integrity News to Know | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9e76564a4411/independence-day-newsletter-test-7232965?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
---
|

### Flashback Quote....
The men and women of Afghanistan are building a nation
that is free, and proud, and fighting terror
\- and America is honored to be their friend.
\- George W. Bush
---
| | August 21, 2021

Hi Friend -

This was a week of heavy hearts. Watching our country turn it's back on Afghanistan, letting the Taliban swarm in, leaving Americans and our Afghani allies on the ground, uninformed and alone. What are we thinking?

My mind immediately flashed to images seen over the years of elections in Afghanistan. People standing in line, showing their Voter IDs, dipping their fingers in ink to signify their vote had been cast and knowing full well their finger could be chopped off or worse. But yet, they did it. They turned out and voted, with America's military there on the ground helping to keep the peace and give the Afghani people a chance to experience freedom of expression through the power of their vote. Years of fragile progress made towards the empowerment of women and the advancement of women's rights was crushed. It's all gone.

Here at home there are still a lot of questions left unanswered about 2020. Lots of misinformation, lots of information still to come, but all the while 2022 midterm elections ebb ever closer. What should be ringing in all our ears is Barack Obama's oft repeated quote, "Elections have consequences."

Now more than ever before, we need to commit to participating in our local elections. If things are broken, work to fix them. We're all in this together.

May God bless all those whose hearts yearn to be free. May God bless America.

Ever onward -

PS - Cleaning up your local voter rolls to better ensure accuracy is a great way to engage! Our web-based app**IV3** is designed to help you do just that. We are rolling it out first in Georgia, Texas, and Montana. **Signups start next week, stay tuned. **

PPS - On August 28th, groups are planning coordinated marches across the country for the purpose of advancing the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, which is one of several legislative attempts to federalize elections. To learn more about their messaging, check out their main organizing website, [March on for Voting Rights](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=0c48fd4771&e=ad8cba7e98)
---

---

Check us out on Instagram and Facebook and let us know what you think! body:
I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3v7_hbT3qSzGmFJvIZh4xayzpM6LQewLF2BKGxuahq1vWxYYpnBHpXHfDzGtMKjzWvv6VyQHcYcTdJ-XZFcph7Vipn_YRG7gVwhCEKuhOa2JhdBHDVNQJB5Q-wMWGUUgWCfNwjffJgMLA79i1ZNokI5RFbRnZV6c_U6-nlzS2iswuWFRjnDm-CpHKQ6VYKua6ypOjnRH0ponPsFF63zrx9wE%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3vy21KAcBbeuyIDB3-qOiEP0FxO1GbmT3Ons2vP4YUMnXu7_xDfoSWxChiUD5OhEiFrbsF8g4ZwT3Pi0Z0kjJHlioEj0gkl2dO5DM9W23sMor3Bz9fdpAaVITRuNufgVJY0wrFNUlK2O9IvbF7EOxpHNfjQybw7YLpeT0yrLMNjWKtBDjFUlxHddgM1ht_j_TUPJVl02PgO6glK_JASwAfrw%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3v223z93ZgMDApAE2iIzYjXVXGe76nYY4qbKfV53QTTAyLuT_DehICXdFPVBwOdpduTV18G1gc_hftoLfNQQe9tiK-fvjEFeWPZNDa6WLcsKKw3c28tZxNGM8ShPb9mXM1FYOSMLhRNWRjQXG6zNGzMl8_8ujHeGCsLTXPbX_Zl8g4Xmz5SnvyGUcGcvrcewE13AxbJDGLKDpNRdxQKGEgqs%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3v8pH32f9u-_dChqtw6ZMjfnaTeG3VkDvxNGSrVerqXtR-O9zGYf6DMDxkHtggbKQpZgjEpQLwnJNwoxWMHAjU75WNV0tDZdTbSGlb7HgjtC7riTvKFrHcG7BozBSQ4bMO0x39mUOFUca7_qAMCMkspyAADCS9R9PVMHS0t01BcxBr7c4m6jtVI0QVSOvUBADdTZdW5lP6kTXCKPuaacWHek%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3v8ygIlvQq0-pALDCOU0m-5JisBX1vCXlLeAF--rVEwUWu94CbsWiuBRbvDuLD7F_j3ioiY9c1UkI_tPNv1KIJwvjhu4cKfdZXXpTN2UakmnL7CjP8Rjvi4RzcIlKrJvtKDmv5dkDe0EBGZQ92PiWDXNAZ9HKoyfOdjOpqPSXNVOK1jqJAbIvWcByUrV0New_jvjZkk-53a-7_5eZQGCOD48%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3vwrKYuti65r_C5v4MlpiVRyjqf4_iFwrCrltygh3Od-sY5qgIetKcjEwBPL2UxuIFOs957nSCREeg0Q-JDc_QM1_-5KyChFbuXMs8GyISvl28OjAkW2YSJlOGaYrgoRv2zkaF17HR4BU6WjM41xWrbzfGvfTWwARYzS7829VWMVpG6HGBK9clxYWloGeVb5qL4_XlWcLPbES7-4dhlHr6j8%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=feed86d165384f1f9b607b127437fad6&_e=Gj2KDWicf4z50spGYchC6ZAI6HWTcSpzKW2W5Mw4xmqPeAKGjCO06QLYrl7n2k5K-RQl8tLeP4UZoWELwArIKP8kj2GvYmtrkAd_hTpDWFDRBDJ_gV61uLasKXGDRkXGJhK8FGz4XDrI-tiGOx86F-gwzEIXX36zZCDNpDhcNWmhneg54lEv6lecJtS_T0kHxUyBbwEDbc5qhdTWuQfsaYeahhj-_xUP-GhmmtxR9evyb2DyJyTAYmjWV7ZesTSdZAZObeQZHu67cYhZ5HC3v0x0r0sGQw5Es72dnTgThBGI6pVqBtZcT4lQHXOFV0fGAZL96rb-O1nkuZV9G8gftE4hQv2VZAzP4pSxvumbLtn-5Lpi_MZK2kHsMPApKa7HhUn3m20IL68vmqhNMnsTteKSNYtg51a43_cpvk51ouKOTv57KPyNZJiO7yW6L_7lQk2JCtNApKKl4fAlNQMda-IlAXEApAGdh0neesV423A%3D)

In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Crucial facts from Afghanistan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St
body:
This week, I joined Briahna Joy Gray to discuss the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan, and how our own country’s double standards helped ensure the eventual outcome there. | | |
---
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMaskcei4IkOQslHWC1i_AMBj0V6gRsmJ-cCgGv5HKvHW1l8pqMsWSSR53JVG7ShYLnJn3Ph7DJY1E8n2vcaWNUOnMr0vAfPG7a7MS_A91xoF9t17mGIBje1g1wQs47yXJJAcQnMxzoJObBoP6lvjg8fFRxoDABniDjgcc1_MA8sA2Rfv0JGarYv0bbPwAR572nCOqV4n00ReKVi5u3CUO0xHaBdVVjmOpiIO7QkCPElDu2twjQh5yVABew9kIyH_JCol68Ks75-05gkRr4pKqxirQi32SG2eD1yakhlSMff2GE/3en/kerZ-pmBQh2p_IKikDe0og/h0/2RY1NvcL9Km1wCxXFJm4gspsrWr_C7faWXGAIfkoLdc)
| | Dear Peter, Over the past week, more Americans have discussed Afghanistan than during the preceding decade. Yet, for all the discussions about U.S. foreign policy, the war, the withdrawal, and the aftermath, few voices have noted some of the most crucial factors driving recent events. I had the chance to join Briahna Joy Gray this week alongside journalist Graeme Smith and Stephen Semler, co-founder of Security Policy Reform Institute, to explore and explain some of the issues that other discussions have overlooked. [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOJPR4Z5lDybbWIPhQSOR8Gc3kAzggoa7NJmdlKIP8X_faU3QDzaVJ0dtbjureeVSDdcKArdZhKNtc4P8Zmr39xF5TtP080svanZ-qkWJAyl5biEPHLwNY6gCt4B2QuYrJowGN5vvJFaKMeqcbVIAefJQ5ZWdwIOlCs_rUipjzwrQVJI2UVLMCTkZADjfDFGx-dZiQVpLXRXJYLJ-IGAjZl8Scle7AlYr0RNJTsI0--pX_r3fkd2srRX0JVsKaWdyJsdNpmvPlULhl8fuBkVDpXYwF_y0hKsD_2UX8-4MPe9rt4w9GcNsH1FT8YHCNmnTfKY1jelFtFQ2xeXYnyGoZdZxp6xm886QGSemQnPyi_LplGy0UpOFFvHZx8-JtK_aA/3en/kerZ-pmBQh2p_IKikDe0og/h1/1QqRrObVPslOrcXGN-yfpINhJkZdjTsgZ1_D5wScZzc)**[Do you want a voice in Congress who understands global events, and has worked for years to inform the public discussion? Why defer to the generation of policymakers who continues stumbling through recurring patterns of imperial hubris?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-07bUEMHgky0DklJT4RAuBL2KrQjUHQVsv8Mwjhmxw-ssRM1Mwxs7Sle8GRkr0zI0NQ6cs2j6ZvSVLUEs5SIkQSAycTyjoc2qAkY3sopVeJRkcX44hexpUh_qu1-BbUcCMCbxdIzCsJmmpctrW91pRKYflYGA-9M5C6dendqDO4LHgpuiXzHP5e6nIAoMnPQcirdQKZK1gle3hHwlLQulbRvaP4nEVRYNGvQyR2Wdm8GTuI-PXQImejczQ_Df6AyiHDucO5Tom0XeiDYFGG8uDdHouJAZ5CmPRFM4l6gfdEzd9zEHEUuFNWdi7LLHvzXQUwBAT1HsnM68Co_XdRa1WE/3en/kerZ-pmBQh2p_IKikDe0og/h2/rBV1gO2pYx0ZT20P9T8ieQXMfckb6_O7SdUuK9wFyjY)****** Most discussions about Afghanistan in U.S. news media have focused on the U.S. withdrawal, and concerns about human rights at risk during the transition to rule by the Taliban. These concerns about human rights, however, appear opportunistic when compared with the broader history of the U.S. presence in Afghanistan over the past 20 years. The same voices expressing concern for human rights in Afghanistan today were not often critical of the U.S. human rights violations that preceded the withdrawal, from torture at Bagram Air Force Base to massive civilian casualties from decades of effectively random & arbitrary drone strikes. Washington’s stances on human rights—claiming to defend them, while abusing them in practice, and looking the other way rather than holding U.S. officials accountable—reflect hypocrisy. That hypocrisy, in turn, helped undermine the legitimacy of the Afghan state. ************[Can you join us today to help defend human rights from our country’s military-industrial complex? I’ve written articles, organized direct action, mounted policy advocacy campaigns, shared performance art, and recruited other artists to occupy public space for decades to raise these issues. I’m eager to escalate that struggle in Congress.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-wxBXXRpmrdZU6XhfDmDm6rdwHpmwaeT5AqW0kKhtfwmIZ2i8u3X4_xDjNZub1ab7h6AkB_yJTsfvKwQ3myYj2i3bGQQRBVNaJGcbgHG5eDNpvmYyOykId4OVpauMXSRgZsUYxER9ko2ygkaeZkKsjiNHXMbdWMWAOgqSFxOkBqxDmhuRW12cgWAzdRQU5mJJ_Wx0c6ZKQ4cMDt81rwyCIinst2E6xaiEmnQsuR9MrDUxAVYfswi2ao3eX6OTbMjkABAMIX92khzdmaAqzDRCOPyscwpwlAulPFU5b7Fk4pO2fOTfY_hEfsQ7FoRQnkuxPhaibSHAUci9H0L7b1dEG0/3en/kerZ-pmBQh2p_IKikDe0og/h3/R6oQVRC_urn8qEdEdh6ua6EgTvhrcyfSbgRlCshpLHA)******** Human rights weren’t the only area where Washington’s hypocrisy drove an unfortunate outcome on the ground. Our nation’s stances on trade have reflected the same tension between rhetoric and reality. For instance, we talk about the value of “free trade,” while applying tariffs to foreign goods across a range of industries, including textiles, which happen to be among Afghanistan’s principle exports. The denial of economic opportunity primes the pump for extremist recruitment. Even worse is the impact of the black market in opium, which expanded dramatically after the U.S. invasion. While it was not the only source of financing for violent extremists, the poppy trade played a key role. Crucially, it offered that opportunity only because legitimate channels for legal trade subject to taxation were not available. **[Are you tired of watching Washington step into preventable pitfalls? Many of us got it right when the generation of corporate politicians got it wrong. New voices offer a chance to enable better choices, but we need your help._Can you join us today?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x4B63xNAwgGph4W5eA_sU5aJUyhfuQ_B3XEgAufY7a-zFm7co2_A7YDkusLyz-Ld4unIjnei_XpCiyOpygMBmQLVpM9PaoaHjjIMCPZPmBKVJ888w_Y5WDtyz2C9kiO3U7mweshe5YaYeJVuP6QXOREwG1h0kwyaUi1I9AuDjobMJf8KwkQahc4AQ1mgueED6yG0yPNKl2UUIIJrdxAeEOD3w3w-mwBrvL7I2Qzk0K19BRN5uX0rOVmkacm9kEThbzsvPX6mRXKekgpwS_D_GRSwJQKUBkHMusTwdlbuLcxnxwwvtLhE1SfciOBh6cOg7pHkpZ30CjiO3bsCDpwkR_9Jc9oZ2WugPYkSo0az2CPm5Lnzb7JU0JLdDkmrRGNho/3en/kerZ-pmBQh2p_IKikDe0og/h4/cIcqMGMjyJv7DD23Qvd49zYzcB4FY2vHzIs2qVotNlQ)__** My earliest political acts addressed U.S. foreign policy. I grew concerned about corporate globalization in the 90s, and began organizing direct action in 2002 in an effort to stop the invasion of Iraq before it started. In the decades since then, I’ve continually escalated and expanded my work across the country. Today, more and more Americans are waking up to the reality of longstanding U.S. foreign policy failure. With your support, I’m looking forward to helping fix it. Thanks for standing with me—and human rights! Have a grateful weekend, Shahid

clean_body: This week, I joined Briahna Joy Gray to discuss the U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan, and how our own country’s double standards helped ensure the eventual outcome there. | | | | | Dear Peter, Over the past week, more Americans have discussed Afghanistan than during the preceding decade. Yet, for all the discussions about U.S. foreign policy, the war, the withdrawal, and the aftermath, few voices have noted some of the most crucial factors driving recent events. I had the chance to join Briahna Joy Gray this week alongside journalist Graeme Smith and Stephen Semler, co-founder of Security Policy Reform Institute, to explore and explain some of the issues that other discussions have overlooked. ** Most discussions about Afghanistan in U.S. news media have focused on the U.S. withdrawal, and concerns about human rights at risk during the transition to rule by the Taliban. These concerns about human rights, however, appear opportunistic when compared with the broader history of the U.S. presence in Afghanistan over the past 20 years. The same voices expressing concern for human rights in Afghanistan today were not often critical of the U.S. human rights violations that preceded the withdrawal, from torture at Bagram Air Force Base to massive civilian casualties from decades of effectively random & arbitrary drone strikes. Washington’s stances on human rights—claiming to defend them, while abusing them in practice, and looking the other way rather than holding U.S. officials accountable—reflect hypocrisy. That hypocrisy, in turn, helped undermine the legitimacy of the Afghan state. ************ Human rights weren’t the only area where Washington’s hypocrisy drove an unfortunate outcome on the ground. Our nation’s stances on trade have reflected the same tension between rhetoric and reality. For instance, we talk about the value of “free trade,” while applying tariffs to foreign goods across a range of industries, including textiles, which happen to be among Afghanistan’s principle exports. The denial of economic opportunity primes the pump for extremist recruitment. Even worse is the impact of the black market in opium, which expanded dramatically after the U.S. invasion. While it was not the only source of financing for violent extremists, the poppy trade played a key role. Crucially, it offered that opportunity only because legitimate channels for legal trade subject to taxation were not available. ** My earliest political acts addressed U.S. foreign policy. I grew concerned about corporate globalization in the 90s, and began organizing direct action in 2002 in an effort to stop the invasion of Iraq before it started. In the decades since then, I’ve continually escalated and expanded my work across the country. Today, more and more Americans are waking up to the reality of longstanding U.S. foreign policy failure. With your support, I’m looking forward to helping fix it. Thanks for standing with me—and human rights! Have a grateful weekend, Shahid | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Shahid Buttar for Congress Committee, 1390 Market St., Suite 200, San Francisco, CA 94102 | | Sent via . subject: If the election wasn't stolen, then...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Elections matter! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0e78c045e3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a proud America-First Patriot and I am leading the charge in America’s audit in Maricopa County, Arizona, and I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona to preserve Election integrity in Arizona for the next Presidential election to ensure the Democrats cannot steal it from us again!

**I am writing you today to let you know that very soon the results from the Audit will be released. **

_And these results are more important than ever. We have seen the price in blood from the Democrats stealing the election._
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ce8a5d9738&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **If the election was not stolen, then we would not be evacuating Americans from the rooftop of the US Embassy in Kabul.**

**If the election was not stolen, then we would not be ceding an area almost the size of Texas to Islamic Radical Terrorists.**

**And if the election was not stolen, we would not have the “President” of the United States get on national TV and defend the WHY of the exit, and not the WAY it was botched.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e15186de1f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Radical incompetence on a massive scale. That’s what Americans got because Democrats wanted to play dirty and couldn’t accept a few mean tweets from the President.**

_There is a direct line from fraud in Maricopa to blood in the soil in Afghanistan. This is why we must finish the Audit in Arizona and expand the audit to every state in America._

**I am disgusted and sleepless over what has been a direct result of massive incompetence of the current administration in carrying out the specific and well-hedged and protected plan of President Trump. **

**_And if the election had not been stolen, we would not be in the terrible predicament we are right now. We would not be sending more Americans off to risk their lives in the deserts and mountains of Afghanistan._**

There is no excuse. There is only guilt. And the best chance we have of reversing this catastrophe and bringing competence back to the White House is through a strong finish of Arizona’s audit and an expansion to other states.

Like Pennsylvania...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bbbf4dc3c1&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| All around the country we are seeing the wildfire of election integrity spread.

**And I will tell you this, from what I am seeing on the ground every day through my interactions with America first patriots, this is a wildfire that will spread only bigger, especially as countless Americans join the movement disgusted by what the worst administration in history has “accomplished” in not even its first year!**

_[But I need your help. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=987b23c5be&e=44b8c466b0) This is but the first battle of a long war for election integrity that we are fighting. And we are seeing the casualties. [Please help me continue the fight for election integrity to restore competence and order to America!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=58d7d49394&e=44b8c466b0)_

My name is Mark Finchem, [and I need your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=9b7986de99&e=44b8c466b0)

**We are running a historic campaign to lead Arizona’s elections as Secretary of State. I will protect our elections from the shameless Democrats.**

But at its core, this is a grassroots movement, [and I need your support.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=41f4de770e&e=44b8c466b0)

[_Donate today to join the #ProveIt movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=478dff4d0f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d0e595dd73&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1f084b7a59&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

This was Joe Biden and the Democrats’ plan all along... Peter—Jeff here.

You know President Trump once said, “without borders, we don’t have a country,” and he was exactly right.

The Biden administration has turned our entire country into a ‘sanctuary city’ in just _**SIX MONTHS!**_

Let’s be clear, they don’t care who is coming into our country, which is why they failed to:
* **Test effectively for COVID-19**
* **Deport illegal immigrants with known criminal records**
* **Secure the southern border**

Democrats have manufactured a crisis at the southern border and now are planning to grant amnesty and a pathway to citizenship to 22 MILLION illegal immigrants!

That’s why we’re seeing the _New York Times_ calling to allow illegal immigrants the right to vote in our elections!

Fortunately, Democrats don’t have quite the majority they need in the Senate to push through this radical amnesty plan. _**But they could soon!**_

**If I don’t win this fight in Pennsylvania, Democrats will have the power they need to radically and irreparably destroy America as we know it!**

_[**Peter, will you RUSH $5, $10, or even $25 to ensure that Democrats don’t consolidate their power in 2022?**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=4bd8a1c7f0af485bb53ca92cfeb53212&_e=ydcxjDDrGzX8pUISVHMLDfAXDc4QgPKxNGp_w7FsvV0sBRIybs8UJx8OeCC7hrNEBSppzmFr6ywsEKWVjyodsZ1eYD-4V_6JlMOEcEc7pBV0aC4znNaq4qLvEB5fA_bAr9-eiPvDYIdxZbXtAHzZ4c1_Hqjj6l5K0gNqUxzf1pme3J4AG3OqEF_h6h_b5NyB2kXW8_fqH6Ste_6BG2rWQfOUWKISyPa84yAaSW_hUgm_nu-Q5cdVTvWNbGV1oJJpSOv_TbOJvenW_fRBKOV2E5H_oelgebCg7NcJMq8olZtIDLnEjD8tktvzTtXK5Mfs7iP0zlpal9TzQyanMYGdPiRoTIwH8mux1dSg8t9vQ8wJA3sSpjcUhmqstSzJra4GB5ZOn4TLWdHNZMmA7Scqx0s2CW2_IRR4muFN1diP_PtXR0T9587mySszstXyOihj3WakHmyvdWJxKQx9IptZz90i8bgfGAxXXRWv2a54h5LIvYD0rKKZUpgQc4MzUDUp)_

Thanks,
Jeff Bartos
